statements.select:
SELECT RID, SID, MEMBER_USER_ID, ISFOREIGN, ACID ,NAME, BIRTHDAY, SEX, EMAIL, ZIPCODE, ADDR_CITY_1, ADDR_CITY_2 ,ADDR, TEL1, TEL2, MOBILE, FAX, PAGEURL, OCID ,CREATEDATE,MODIFYDATE ,EDU, MARRI, GRADU, SCHOOLNAME, DEPTNAME ,PLANTYPE FROM MEMBER WHERE RID=#RID# AND SID=#SID#
AND ACID=#ACID#
AND MEMBER_USER_ID=#MID#

SELECT A.MEM_SN MEMSN, A.MEM_IDNO MEMIDNO, A.MEM_PWD MEMPWD, A.MEM_NAME MEMNAME, A.MEM_FOREIGN MEMFOREIGN, A.MEM_EDU MEMEDU, A.MEM_BIRTH MEMBIRTH, A.MEM_SEX MEMSEX, A.MEM_MILITARY MEMMILITARY, A.MEM_MARRY MEMMARRY, A.MEM_GRADUATE MEMGRADUATE, A.MEM_SCHOOL MEMSCHOOL, A.MEM_DEPART MEMDEPART, A.MEM_ZIP MEMZIP, A.MEM_ZIP6W MEMZIP6W, A.MEM_ADDR MEMADDR, A.MEM_TEL MEMTEL, A.MEM_TELN MEMTELN, A.MEM_MOBILE MEMMOBILE, A.MEM_EMAIL MEMEMAIL FROM E_MEMBER A WHERE 1=1
AND A.MEM_SN=#MEM_SN#
AND A.MEM_IDNO=#MEM_IDNO# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),A.MEM_BIRTH,111)=#MEM_BIRTH#

SELECT TOP 1 M.RID, M.SID, M.MEMBER_USER_ID, M.ISFOREIGN, M.ACID ,M.NAME, M.BIRTHDAY, M.SEX, M.EMAIL, M.ZIPCODE, M.ADDR_CITY_1, M.ADDR_CITY_2 ,M.ADDR, M.TEL1, M.TEL2, M.MOBILE, M.FAX, M.PAGEURL, M.OCID, M.CREATEDATE ,M.MODIFYDATE, M.EDU, M.MARRI, M.GRADU, M.SCHOOLNAME, M.DEPTNAME FROM MEMBER M JOIN E_MEMBER E ON E.MEM_IDNO=M.ACID AND E.MEM_BIRTH=CONVERT(date,M.BIRTHDAY) WHERE M.BIRTHDAY IS NOT NULL AND M.ACID=#IDNO#
statements.insert: INSERT INTO MEMBERHIS ( RID, SID, MEMBER_USER_ID, ISFOREIGN, ACID, NAME, BIRTHDAY, SEX, EMAIL, ZIPCODE, ADDR_CITY_1, ADDR_CITY_2, ADDR,TEL1, TEL2, MOBILE, FAX, PAGEURL, OCID, CREATEDATE, MODIFYDATE, EDU, MARRI, GRADU, SCHOOLNAME,DEPTNAME,PLANTYPE ) VALUES ( #RID#, #SID#, #MEMBER_USER_ID#, #ISFOREIGN#, #ACID#, #NAME#, #BIRTHDAY#, #SEX#, #EMAIL#, #ZIPCODE#, #ADDR_CITY_1#, #ADDR_CITY_2#, #ADDR#, #TEL1#, #TEL2#, #MOBILE#, #FAX#, #PAGEURL#, #OCID#, #CREATEDATE#, #MODIFYDATE#, #EDU#, #MARRI#, #GRADU#, #SCHOOLNAME#,#DEPTNAME#,#PLANTYPE# )

INSERT INTO MEMBER (RID, SID, MEMBER_USER_ID, ISFOREIGN, ACID, NAME, BIRTHDAY, SEX, EMAIL, ZIPCODE, ADDR_CITY_1, ADDR_CITY_2, ADDR,TEL1, TEL2, MOBILE, FAX, PAGEURL, OCID, CREATEDATE, MODIFYDATE, EDU, MARRI, GRADU, SCHOOLNAME,DEPTNAME,PLANTYPE ) VALUES ( #RID#, #SID#, #MEMBER_USER_ID#, #ISFOREIGN#, #ACID#, #NAME#, #BIRTHDAY#, #SEX#, #EMAIL#, #ZIPCODE#, #ADDR_CITY_1#, #ADDR_CITY_2#, #ADDR#, #TEL1#, #TEL2#, #MOBILE#, #FAX#, #PAGEURL#, #OCID#, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #EDU#, #MARRI#, #GRADU#, #SCHOOLNAME#,#DEPTNAME#,#PLANTYPE# )
statements.update: UPDATE MEMBER SET MEMBER_USER_ID=#MEMBER_USER_ID#,ISFOREIGN=#ISFOREIGN#,ACID=#ACID#,NAME=#NAME#,BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY#,SEX=#SEX#,EMAIL=#EMAIL#, ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#,ADDR_CITY_1=#ADDR_CITY_1#,ADDR_CITY_2=#ADDR_CITY_2#,ADDR=#ADDR#,TEL1=#TEL1#,TEL2=#TEL2#,MOBILE=#MOBILE#,FAX=#FAX#, OCID=#OCID#,MODIFYDATE=GETDATE(),EDU=#EDU#,MARRI=#MARRI#,GRADU=#GRADU#,SCHOOLNAME=#SCHOOLNAME#,DEPTNAME=#DEPTNAME#,PLANTYPE=#PLANTYPE# WHERE RID=#RID# AND SID=#SID#
statements.insert: INSERT INTO E_MEMBER ( MEM_SN, MEM_IDNO, MEM_PWD, MEM_NAME, MEM_FOREIGN, MEM_EDU, MEM_BIRTH, MEM_SEX, MEM_MILITARY, MEM_MARRY, MEM_GRADUATE, MEM_SCHOOL, MEM_DEPART, MEM_ZIP,MEM_ZIP6W, MEM_ADDR, MEM_TEL, MEM_TELN, MEM_MOBILE, MEM_EMAIL, MEM_OPENSEC, MEM_MEMO, MEM_TIMS, MEM_USR_ID, MEM_REGTIME, MEM_OPUSER, MEM_UDATE, HANDTYPEID, HANDLEVELID, STOPMEM, MEM_LOGINCNT, HANDTYPEID2, HANDLEVELID2, MFLAG) VALUES ( #MEMSN#, #MEMIDNO#, #MEMPWD#, #MEMNAME#, #MEMFOREIGN#, #MEMEDU#, #MEMBIRTH#, #MEMSEX#, #MEMMILITARY#, #MEMMARRY#, #MEMGRADUATE#, #MEMSCHOOL#, #MEMDEPART#, #MEMZIP#,#MEMZIP6W#, #MEMADDR#, #MEMTEL#, #MEMTELN#, #MEMMOBILE#, #MEMEMAIL#, '0', #MEMMEMO#, '0', #MEMUSRID#, GETDATE(), #MEMOPUSER#, GETDATE(), #HANDTYPEID#, #HANDLEVELID#, #STOPMEM#, #MEMLOGINCNT#, #HANDTYPEID2#, #HANDLEVELID2#, #MFLAG#)
statements.update:
UPDATE E_MEMBER SET MEM_NAME=#MEMNAME#,MEM_FOREIGN=#MEMFOREIGN#,MEM_EDU=#MEMEDU#,MEM_BIRTH=#MEMBIRTH#,MEM_SEX=#MEMSEX#,MEM_MILITARY=#MEMMILITARY#,MEM_MARRY=#MEMMARRY#, MEM_GRADUATE=#MEMGRADUATE#,MEM_SCHOOL=#MEMSCHOOL#,MEM_DEPART=#MEMDEPART#,MEM_ZIP=#MEMZIP#,MEM_ZIP6W=#MEMZIP6W#,MEM_ADDR=#MEMADDR#,MEM_TEL=#MEMTEL#,MEM_TELN=#MEMTELN#, MEM_MOBILE=#MEMMOBILE#,MEM_EMAIL=#MEMEMAIL#,ELOGIN=GETDATE(),MEM_OPUSER=#MEMOPUSER#,MEM_UDATE=GETDATE(),MEM_LOGINCNT=ISNULL(MEM_LOGINCNT,0)+1 WHERE 1=1
AND MEM_SN=#MEMSN#
AND MEM_IDNO=#MEMIDNO# AND MEM_BIRTH=CONVERT(DATE,#MEMBIRTH#)
statements.delete: DELETE FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE SIGNNO IS NULL AND OCID1=#OCID1# AND ESETID=#ESETID#
statements.update: UPDATE SYS_SIGNUP_CTL SET $column$=CASE WHEN $column$ $op$ 1 < 0 THEN 0 ELSE $column$ $op$ 1 END WHERE HOST=#host#
UPDATE STUD_STUDENTINFO SET ISAGREE=#ISAGREE# WHERE IDNO=#IDNO#
statements.select: SELECT C.OCID,C.CLASSCNAME FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO C ON B.OCID=C.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO D ON C.PLANID=D.PLANID AND C.COMIDNO=D.COMIDNO AND C.SEQNO=D.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=C.PLANID WHERE C.STDATE<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND C.NOTOPEN='N' AND D.APPLIEDRESULT='Y' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND C.FTDATE < cast(getdate() as date) and DATEADD(day,21,c.FTDATE)>=cast(getdate() as date) and dbo.FN_GET_IDED_2(B.OCID, A.IDNO)=cast(b.socid as varchar) + ',0'

SELECT TOP 1 C_CONTENT1 FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE FUNID='008' AND C_STATUS <> 'D' AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) /*在發佈期間內*/ ORDER BY C_SDATE DESC,SEQNO DESC

SELECT TOP 5 SEQNO,C_TITLE,C_SDATE,C_EDATE,C_URL,C_CONTENT1 FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE C_STATUS <> 'D' AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) /*在發佈期間內*/ AND FUNID=#FUNID#
AND SUB_FUNID=#SUB_FUNID#
ORDER BY C_SORT1,C_SDATE DESC

/*CC.CLASSCNAME + '
(' + OO.ORGNAME + ')' CLASSCNAME*/ SELECT TOP 10 IP.TPLANID,CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP AR WITH(NOLOCK) ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID=CC.TMID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID=CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID=CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID WHERE CC.TNUM > 0 AND ((IP.TPLANID='28' AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N') OR IP.TPLANID IN ('06','70')) /*產投非企業包班(產學性)*/ AND IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*開班*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND cc.MODIFYDATE>=GETDATE()-1000 /*AND CAST(CC.ONSHELLDATE AS DATE)<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)*/ /*AND CAST(CC.FENTERDATE AS DATE)>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)*/ /*找六個月內可報名的班*/ /*AND TO_CHAR(CC.FENTERDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD')<=TO_CHAR(ADD_MONTHS(SYSDATE,24), 'YYYY/MM/DD')*/ /*找六個月內可報名的班*/ /*AND TRUNC(CC.SENTERDATE)>=TRUNC(SYSDATE)*/ /*AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),CC.FENTERDATE,111)<=CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),DATEADD(MONTH,6,GETDATE()),111)*//*找六個月內可報名的班*/ /*AND CAST(CC.SENTERDATE AS DATE)>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)*/ /*AND CAST(CC.STDATE AS DATE) > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)*/ /*未開訓*/ AND CAST(CC.FENTERDATE AS DATE)>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) /*未結束報名*/ AND CC.SHARE_COUNT > 0 ORDER BY CC.SHARE_COUNT DESC

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT dbo.FN_CHK_KID20(cc.OCID) I_OCID_KID20,dbo.FN_CHK_KID25(cc.OCID,cc.STDATE) I_OCID_KID25 ,CC.OCID,CC.PLANID,CC.COMIDNO,CC.SEQNO,CC.RID,CC.TMID ,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE CC.TNUM > 0 /* 有招生人數 */ AND cc.STDATE>=CONVERT(date,#STDATE1#) AND cc.STDATE<=CONVERT(date,#STDATE2#) AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*開班*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /* 可顯示的 */ AND CAST(CC.FENTERDATE AS DATE)>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) /*未結束報名*/ AND ISNULL(CC.ONSHELLDATE,ISNULL(CC.STDATE,GETDATE()+1))<=GETDATE() /* 已上架或已開訓 */ AND CC.KID20_NOSHOW IS NULL /*政策性課程，但不顯示於前台*/ ) SELECT TOP 10 IP.TPLANID,CC.OCID ,CC.CLASSCNAME,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 FROM WC1 CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.AUTH_RELSHIP AR WITH(NOLOCK) ON AR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID=CC.TMID WHERE (IP.TPLANID='28' AND ISNULL(PP.ISBUSINESS,'N')='N') /*產投非企業包班(產投)*/ AND ip.YEARS>=FORMAT(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()),'yyyy') /* 去年到現在 */ AND (CC.I_OCID_KID20>0 OR CC.I_OCID_KID25>0) /*2025政策性課程專區*/ ORDER BY CC.STDATE, CC.FENTERDATE DESC, CC.OCID

WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT dbo.FN_CHK_KID20(cc.OCID) I_OCID_KID20,dbo.FN_CHK_KID25(cc.OCID,cc.STDATE) I_OCID_KID25 ,CC.OCID,CC.PLANID,CC.COMIDNO,CC.SEQNO,CC.RID,CC.TMID,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE,IP.TPLANID FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID=CC.TMID WHERE CC.TNUM>0 /* 有招生人數 */ AND cc.STDATE>=convert(date,dateadd(month,-6,getdate())) AND cc.STDATE<=convert(date,getdate()) AND ISNULL(CC.ONSHELLDATE,ISNULL(CC.STDATE,GETDATE()+1))<=GETDATE() /* 已上架或已開訓 */ AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*開班*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /* 可顯示的 */ /* AND CAST(CC.FENTERDATE AS DATE)>=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) 未結束報名 */ AND CC.KID20_NOSHOW IS NULL /* 政策性課程，但不顯示於前台 */ AND (IP.TPLANID='28' AND ISNULL(PP.ISBUSINESS,'N')='N') /*產投非企業包班(產投)*/ AND ip.YEARS>=FORMAT(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()),'yyyy') /* 去年到現在 */ ) SELECT TOP 10 CC.TPLANID,CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 FROM WC1 CC WHERE (CC.I_OCID_KID20>0 OR CC.I_OCID_KID25>0) /*2025政策性課程專區*/ ORDER BY CC.STDATE

SELECT B_TITLE,B_URL,B_ALT,FILE_NAME /* ,BANNERID,START_DATE,END_DATE */ FROM TB_BANNER WHERE TYPEID=#TYPEID# AND ISUSED='Y' AND START_DATE<=GETDATE() AND (END_DATE IS NULL OR GETDATE()<=END_DATE) ORDER BY SEQ

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C_SDATE DESC) SEQ ,SEQNO, C_TITLE, C_SDATE FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE FUNID=#FUNID# AND SUB_FUNID=#SUB_FUNID# AND C_STATUS <> 'D' AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) /*在發佈期間內*/ ORDER BY C_SORT1,C_SDATE DESC

SELECT B.SEC_NO,B.SEC_CONTENT,B.SEC_PICTURE ,B.SEC_PICTURE_ALT,B.ALIGN_TYPE FROM TB_CONTENT A JOIN TB_CONTENT_SECTION B ON A.SEQNO=B.CONTENTID WHERE A.FUNID=#FUNID# AND A.SUB_FUNID=#SUB_FUNID# AND A.SEQNO=#SEQNO# AND ISNULL(A.C_EDATE,GETDATE()+1)>=GETDATE() /*資料有效日期*/ AND ISNULL(A.C_SDATE,GETDATE())<=GETDATE() /*資料有效日期*/ ORDER BY B.SEC_NO
SELECT FILEID,FILE_ORINAME,FILE_PHYNAME,FILE_TYPE FROM TB_FILE WHERE F_FUNID=#F_FUNID# AND F_GROUPID=#F_GROUPID# ORDER BY FILE_NO

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY C_SDATE DESC) SEQ,SEQNO,C_TITLE,C_SDATE FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE FUNID='001' AND C_STATUS <> 'D' /*AND CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),C_SDATE,111)<=CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),GETDATE(),111)*/ /*在發佈期間內*/ AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) ORDER BY C_SDATE DESC

SELECT B.OCID, B.SOCID
,dbo.FN_GET_IDED_2(B.OCID,A.IDNO) SOCIDCHK ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE1') WRDATE1 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE2') WRDATE2 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCRST(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'CANWRITE') CANWRITE
,dbo.FN_GET_IDED(B.OCID,A.IDNO) SOCIDCHK ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE1') WRDATE1 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE2') WRDATE2 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCRST(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'CANWRITE') CANWRITE
,dbo.FN_GET_IDED_3(B.OCID,A.IDNO) SOCIDCHK ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE1') WRDATE1 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE2') WRDATE2 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCRST(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'CANWRITE') CANWRITE
,dbo.FN_GET_IDED_4(B.OCID,A.IDNO) SOCIDCHK ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE1') WRDATE1 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCDATE(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'WRDATE2') WRDATE2 ,dbo.FN_QUES_FUNCRST(ip.TPLANID,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,#QueType#,'CANWRITE') CANWRITE
/* ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),GETDATE(),111) ATODAY_AD */ ,GETDATE() ATODAY,C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME ,C.YEARS,IP.YEARS PLANYEAR,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE ,CAST(DATEADD(DAY,21,C.FTDATE) AS DATE) FACDATE /*訓後第21天*/ ,CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, C.STDATE, CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))>=0 AND DATEDIFF(DAY, DATEADD(DAY,21,C.FTDATE), CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE))<=0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FACCANWRITE /* 訓練起日至訓後21日內 */ FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.OCID=C.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.PLANID=D.PLANID AND C.COMIDNO =D.COMIDNO AND C.SEQNO =D.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=C.PLANID LEFT JOIN STUD_SUBSIDYCOST SC ON SC.SOCID =B.SOCID WHERE A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND CAST(A.BIRTHDAY AS DATE)=CONVERT(DATE,#BIRTHDAY#) AND CAST(C.STDATE AS DATE)<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND C.NOTOPEN='N' AND D.APPLIEDRESULT='Y' AND B.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3)
AND IP.TPLANID='28'
AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND SC.SOCID IS NOT NULL AND ISNULL(SC.APPLIEDSTATUSM,'Y')='Y'
AND IP.TPLANID IN ('06','07')
AND IP.TPLANID IN ('06','07')
ORDER BY C.STDATE DESC

SELECT IP.YEARS /* ,TO_CHAR((P.TOTALCOST/P.TNUM),99999999.99) TOTALCOST ,TO_CHAR((P.DEFSTDCOST/P.TNUM),99999999.99) DEFSTDCOST*/ ,VR.ORGPLANNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO P ON A.PLANID=P.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=P.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=P.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN VIEW_RIDNAME VR ON VR.RID=P.RID JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.OCID=B.OCID JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO C ON B.SID=C.SID WHERE P.TPLANID='28' AND A.OCID=#OCID# AND B.SOCID=#SOCID#

SELECT VP.YEARS,B.STUDENTID,C.NAME,B.STUDSTATUS,B.REJECTTDATE1,B.REJECTTDATE2,D.ORGKIND ,VP.PLANNAME ,A.RID FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.OCID=B.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO P ON A.PLANID=P.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=P.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=P.SEQNO JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO C ON B.SID=C.SID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO D ON D.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID=A.PLANID /* JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME VR ON VR.RID=A.RID */ WHERE P.TPLANID IN ('06','07') AND A.OCID=#OCID# AND B.SOCID=#SOCID#

SELECT VP.YEARS,B.STUDENTID,C.NAME,B.STUDSTATUS,B.REJECTTDATE1,B.REJECTTDATE2,D.ORGKIND,B.SOCID,VP.PLANNAME ,bq.QNAME,bq.QID,bq.QNOTE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.OCID=B.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO P ON A.PLANID=P.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=P.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=P.SEQNO JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO C ON B.SID=C.SID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO D ON D.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID=A.PLANID LEFT JOIN PLAN_QUESTIONARY pq ON pq.TPLANID=vp.TPLANID LEFT JOIN ID_QUESTIONARY bq ON bq.QID=pq.QID /* JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME VR ON VR.RID=A.RID */ WHERE P.TPLANID IN ('06','07') AND A.OCID=#OCID# AND B.SOCID=#SOCID#

SELECT VR.YEARS,B.STUDENTID,C.NAME,B.STUDSTATUS,B.REJECTTDATE1,B.REJECTTDATE2,D.ORGKIND ,VR.ORGPLANNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.OCID=B.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO P ON A.PLANID=P.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=P.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=P.SEQNO JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO C ON B.SID=C.SID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO D ON D.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME VR ON VR.RID=A.RID WHERE P.TPLANID='28' AND A.OCID=#OCID# AND B.SOCID=#SOCID#

SELECT a.OCID ,a.SENTERDATE ,a.FENTERDATE ,a.TNUM ,a.ADMISSIONS ,ip.YEARS ,ip.TPLANID ,a.CLSID FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO a WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE b WITH(NOLOCK) on b.TMID=a.TMID JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP d WITH(NOLOCK) on d.RID=a.RID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO c WITH(NOLOCK) on c.OrgID=d.OrgID JOIN ID_PLAN ip WITH(NOLOCK) ON ip.PlanID=a.PlanID WHERE ip.TPlanID IN ('06','28','70') AND a.NotOpen='N' AND a.OCID=#OCID#

select isnull(count(1),0) total FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 SE2 WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 SY2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON SE2.ESETID=SY2.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SY2.OCID1=CC.OCID where sy2.OCID1=#OCID# and isnull(sy2.signUpStatus,0) != 2

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM,CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1 ,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,ISNULL(dbo.FN_GET_ZIP_DISTANCE(dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(EM.MEM_ZIP,EM.MEM_ZIP6W),dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(sp1.ZIPCODE,sp1.ZIP6W)), 0) Distance1 ,ISNULL(dbo.FN_GET_ZIP_DISTANCE(dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(EM.MEM_ZIP,EM.MEM_ZIP6W),dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(tp1.ZIPCODE,tp1.ZIP6W)), 0) Distance2 ,CC.ISCLOSED,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME ,pp.DISTANCE FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ID_CLASS IC WITH(NOLOCK) on IC.CLSID=CC.CLSID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.AUTH_RELSHIP AR WITH(NOLOCK) ON AR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID JOIN dbo.PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO LEFT JOIN dbo.V_TRAINDESCTP TP ON TP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND TP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND TP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO LEFT JOIN dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON SP1.PTID=PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID LEFT JOIN dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON TP1.PTID=PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ZIPNAME SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ZIPNAME TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN dbo.MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN dbo.E_MEMBER EM WITH(NOLOCK) ON EM.MEM_SN=#MemSN# WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL
AND CC.KID20_NOSHOW IS NULL /*政策性課程，但不顯示於前台*/ AND (dbo.FN_CHK_KID20(cc.OCID)>0 OR dbo.FN_CHK_KID25(cc.OCID,cc.STDATE)>0) /*2025政策性課程專區*/
/*AND CC.STDATE > GETDATE()*/ AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.STDATE + 15 > GETDATE() AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE()
AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.STDATE+15 > GETDATE() AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE()
AND UPPER(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+UPPER(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND CC.STDATE>=CONVERT(DATE, #STDATE#)
AND CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE, #FTDATE#)
AND CAST(CC.SENTERDATE AS DATE)=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)
/* AND upper(PP2.TEACHCNAME1) LIKE N'%'+upper(#TEACHCNAME#)+'%' */ AND dbo.FN_GET_TRAINDESC(cc.PLANID,cc.COMIDNO,cc.SEQNO,'TN1B') LIKE N'%'+#TEACHCNAME#+'%'
AND (ISNULL(SIC.CTID,0) IN ($CTID_KEY$) OR ISNULL(TIC.CTID,0) IN ($CTID_KEY$))
AND (ISNULL(SIC.CTID,0)=#CTID# OR ISNULL(TIC.CTID,0)=#CTID#)
AND (SIC.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIC.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
AND CC.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO#
AND UPPER(OO.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#SCHOOLNAME#)+'%'
$TPERIOD28S_Sql$
$WEEKS_Sql$
AND CC.OCID=#OCID#
AND OO.ORGKIND2=#ORGKIND#
AND PP.CLASSCATE=#CLASSCATE#
AND TT.JOBTMID=#JOBTMID#
AND CC.TMID=#TMID#
AND ISNULL(pp.DISTANCE,'3')=#DISTANCE#
AND ISNULL(PV.TGOVEXAM,'')=#TGOVEXAM#
AND (1<>1 OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WHERE PT.PLANID=pp.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=pp.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=pp.SEQNO AND upper(PT.PCONT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%') OR upper(CC.CONTENT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSENGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%')
)
AND (1<>1
OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_ABILITY PA WHERE PA.PLANID=pp.PLANID AND PA.COMIDNO=pp.COMIDNO AND PA.SEQNO=pp.SEQNO AND upper(PA.ABILITY) LIKE '%'+upper(#ABILITYS_list[]#)+'%'))
)
) TB ORDER BY $ORDERBY$ $ORDERDESC$,
STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS ,A.CYCLTYPE ,A.THOURS ,A.TPERIOD ,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,C.PLANNAME ,D.NAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE ,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.JOBNO CJOBNO ,S.CJOBNAME2 CJOBNAME ,A.NOTE3 FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ID_CLASS IC WITH(NOLOCK) ON IC.CLSID=A.CLSID JOIN ID_PLAN B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G WITH(NOLOCK) ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H WITH(NOLOCK) ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.TMID=A.TMID /* LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY */ LEFT JOIN V_SHARECJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E WITH(NOLOCK) ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F WITH(NOLOCK) ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J WITH(NOLOCK) ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN VIEW_SCHEDULE2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID=A.OCID /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WITH(NOLOCK) ON PT.PLANID=A.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=A.SEQNO */ WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ /*直接以 TPLANID='06' 在職訓練計畫取代其他條件*/ /*AND B.TPLANID NOT IN ('15','28','36','45','54') AND ( A.TPROPERTYID='1' OR B.TPLANID IN ('46','47') )*/ AND B.TPLANID='06'
/*AND A.STDATE<=GETDATE()*/ AND A.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() /*2019-03-08 歷史課程查詢改為查超過報名截止日的課程*/
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
AND A.STDATE>=Convert(date ,#STDATE#) AND A.STDATE<=Convert(date ,#FTDATE#)
AND GETDATE()<=A.FENTERDATE
AND B.DISTID IN ($DISTID$)
AND F.CTID IN ($CTID_KEY$)
AND upper(A.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND S.JOBNO=#CJOBNO#
AND A.OCID=#OCID#
$WEEKS_Sql$
AND upper(I.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#DISTNAME#)+'%'
AND ( 1<>1 OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WHERE PT.PLANID=g.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=g.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=g.SEQNO AND upper(PT.PCONT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%') OR upper(A.CONTENT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(A.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(A.CLASSENGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%')
)
AND (1<>1
OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_ABILITY PA WHERE PA.PLANID=g.PLANID AND PA.COMIDNO=g.COMIDNO AND PA.SEQNO=g.SEQNO AND upper(PA.ABILITY) LIKE '%'+upper(#ABILITYS_list[]#)+'%'))
)
) T ORDER BY SENTERDATE, FENTERDATE, STDATE, FTDATE, OCID

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS,A.TPERIOD ,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,C.PLANNAME ,D.NAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE ,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ID_CLASS IC WITH(NOLOCK) on IC.CLSID=A.CLSID JOIN ID_PLAN B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G WITH(NOLOCK) ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H WITH(NOLOCK) ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E WITH(NOLOCK) ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F WITH(NOLOCK) ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J WITH(NOLOCK) ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN VIEW_SCHEDULE2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID=A.OCID /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WITH(NOLOCK) ON PT.PLANID=A.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=A.SEQNO */ WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ /*直接以 TPLANID='70' 在職訓練計畫取代其他條件*/ AND B.TPLANID='70'
AND A.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() /*2019-03-08 歷史課程查詢改為查超過報名截止日的課程*/
/* AND A.STDATE > GETDATE() 測試狀況 不限定 未開訓 */
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
/* AND A.STDATE > GETDATE() 測試狀況 不限定 未開訓 */
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
AND A.STDATE > GETDATE()
AND A.STDATE >=Convert(date ,#STDATE#) AND A.STDATE <=Convert(date ,#FTDATE#)
AND GETDATE()<=A.FENTERDATE /* 課程查詢 為 報名尚未截止日的課程*/
AND B.DISTID IN ( $DISTID$ )
AND F.CTID IN ($CTID_KEY$)
AND upper(A.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND A.OCID=#OCID#
$WEEKS_Sql$
AND upper(I.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#DISTNAME#)+'%'
AND ( 1<>1 OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WHERE PT.PLANID=g.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=g.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=g.SEQNO AND upper(PT.PCONT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%') OR upper(A.CONTENT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(A.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(A.CLASSENGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%')
)
AND (1<>1
OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_ABILITY PA WHERE PA.PLANID=g.PLANID AND PA.COMIDNO=g.COMIDNO AND PA.SEQNO=g.SEQNO AND upper(PA.ABILITY) LIKE '%'+upper(#ABILITYS_list[]#)+'%'))
)
) T ORDER BY SENTERDATE, FENTERDATE, STDATE, FTDATE, OCID

SELECT CC.OCID ,CC.PLANID,CC.COMIDNO,CC.SEQNO,CC.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM,CC.THOURS ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE ,CC.ISCLOSED,CC.RID ,CC.TADDRESS,CC.TADDRESSZIP ZIP1,dbo.FN_GZIP2(CC.TADDRESSZIP6W) ZIP2 ,CASE WHEN GETDATE() < CC.SENTERDATE THEN '尚未開始招生' WHEN GETDATE() > CC.FENTERDATE THEN '已招生結束' WHEN CC.ISCLOSED='Y' THEN '此班已結訓' ELSE '招生中' END CLASSOPEN ,CASE CC.TPROPERTYID WHEN '0' THEN '職前' WHEN '1' THEN '在職' ELSE '委託訓練' END TPROPERTY ,CONVERT(decimal,ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST/CC.TNUM,0,1)) DEFGOVCOST ,CONVERT(decimal,ROUND(PP.DEFSTDCOST/CC.TNUM,0,1)) DEFSTDCOST ,IP.TPLANID,IP.PLANNAME ,KH.HOURRANNAME,KD.NAME ,PP.CAPAGE1,PP.CAPAGE2 ,ISNULL(PP.POINTYN,'N') POINTYN,ISNULL(PP.CREDPOINT,0) CREDPOINT ,CASE PP.CAPSEX WHEN 'F' THEN '女' WHEN 'M' THEN '男' ELSE '不分' END CAPSEX ,CASE PP.CAPMILITARY WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '0103' THEN '役畢(含免役)' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' ELSE '不分' END CAPMILITARY ,OO.ORGNAME,OP.ACTNO ,KT.TRAINEXPNAME,IC.CTID,IC.CTNAME CTNAME1,IZ.ZIPNAME,PP.CONTENT ,OP.ADDRESS,PP.CONTACTNAME PCONTACTNAME,OP.CONTACTNAME,PP.CONTACTPHONE,PP.CONTACTMOBILE,OP.PHONE ,PP.CAPOTHER1,PP.CAPOTHER2,PP.CAPOTHER3 ,OO.ORGKIND2 ,PV.RECRUIT ,PV.SELMETHOD ,PV.ISiCAPCOUR ,PV.iCAPCOURDESC, PP.iCAPNUM,PP.iCAPMARKDATE ,PV.CAPALL ,ISNULL(PV.TGOVEXAM,'N') TGOVEXAM,PV.ENVZEROTRAIN,PV.GOVAGENAME,PV.TGOVEXAMNAME ,PV.MEMO8,PV.TRAINMODE ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.S1ZIPCODE,PT.S1ZIP6W)+PT.S1ZIPNAME+PT.S1ADDRESS +case when PT.S1PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT.S1PLACENAME,')') end ADDRESS21 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.S2ZIPCODE,PT.S2ZIP6W)+PT.S2ZIPNAME+PT.S2ADDRESS +case when PT.S2PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT.S2PLACENAME,')') end ADDRESS22 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.T1ZIPCODE,PT.T1ZIP6W)+PT.T1ZIPNAME+PT.T1ADDRESS +case when PT.T1PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT.T1PLACENAME,')') end ADDRESS31 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.T2ZIPCODE,PT.T2ZIP6W)+PT.T2ZIPNAME+PT.T2ADDRESS +case when PT.T2PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT.T2PLACENAME,')') end ADDRESS32 ,CASE WHEN PT.S1ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL THEN concat(PT.S1ZIPCODE,PT.S1ZIPNAME,PT.S1ADDRESS) END HIDADDRESS21 ,CASE WHEN PT.S2ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL THEN concat(PT.S2ZIPCODE,PT.S2ZIPNAME,PT.S2ADDRESS) END HIDADDRESS22 ,CASE WHEN PT.T1ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL THEN concat(PT.T1ZIPCODE,PT.T1ZIPNAME,PT.T1ADDRESS) END HIDADDRESS31 ,CASE WHEN PT.T2ZIPCODE IS NOT NULL THEN concat(PT.T2ZIPCODE,PT.T2ZIPNAME,PT.T2ADDRESS) END HIDADDRESS32 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIP_DISTANCE(dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(EM.MEM_ZIP,EM.MEM_ZIP6W),dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.S1ZIPCODE,PT.S1ZIP6W)) Distance1 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIP_DISTANCE(dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(EM.MEM_ZIP,EM.MEM_ZIP6W),dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.T1ZIPCODE,PT.T1ZIP6W)) Distance2 ,PT.S1CTNAME CTNAME2 ,PT.T1CTNAME CTNAME3 ,RR.ORGPLANNAME ,CASE WHEN PV.TMethod LIKE '%01%' THEN 'V' else '' END TMETHODC01 ,CASE WHEN PV.TMethod LIKE '%02%' THEN 'V' else '' END TMETHODC02 ,CASE WHEN PV.TMethod LIKE '%03%' THEN 'V' else '' END TMETHODC03 ,CASE WHEN PV.TMethod LIKE '%99%' THEN 'V' else '' END TMETHODC99 ,PV.TMETHODOTH ,PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,dbo.FN_TOTALCOST_TXT(PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,FLOOR((PP.DEFGOVCOST+PP.DEFSTDCOST)/(CASE WHEN ISNULL(CC.TNUM, 1) <> 0 THEN ISNULL(CC.TNUM, 1) ELSE 1 END))) TOTALCOST_TEXT ,ISNULL(dbo.FN_GET_PLAN_ONCLASS2(pp.PlanID,pp.ComIDNO,pp.SeqNo,'WEEKTIME2'), '') WEEKSTIME ,pp.DISTANCE FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR WITH(NOLOCK) ON RR.RID =CC.RID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGPLANINFO OP WITH(NOLOCK) ON OP.RSID=RR.RSID LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_DEGREE KD WITH(NOLOCK) ON KD.DEGREEID=PP.CAPDEGREE LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_ZIP IZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON IZ.ZIPCODE=CC.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN dbo.ID_CITY IC WITH(NOLOCK) ON IC.CTID=IZ.CTID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINPLACE PT WITH(NOLOCK) ON PT.PLANID=PP.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=PP.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_HOURRAN KH WITH(NOLOCK) ON KH.HRID=CC.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_TRAINEXP KT WITH(NOLOCK) ON KT.TEID=CC.TDEADLINE LEFT JOIN dbo.PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=OO.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO LEFT JOIN dbo.E_MEMBER EM WITH(NOLOCK) ON EM.MEM_SN=#MemSN# WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND CC.OCID=#OCID# AND CC.FTDATE > CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) /*尚未結訓*/ AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() /*上架日 is not null 且 今天>=上架日才顯示課程明細*/

SELECT CC.PLANID,CC.COMIDNO,CC.SEQNO,CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM,CC.THOURS ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE ,CC.ISCLOSED,CC.RID ,CC.TADDRESS,CC.TADDRESSZIP ZIP1,dbo.FN_GZIP2(CC.TADDRESSZIP6W) ZIP2 ,CASE WHEN GETDATE() < CC.SENTERDATE THEN '尚未開始招生' WHEN GETDATE() > CC.FENTERDATE THEN '已招生結束' WHEN CC.ISCLOSED='Y' THEN '此班已結訓' ELSE '招生中' END CLASSOPEN ,CASE CC.TPROPERTYID WHEN '0' THEN '職前' WHEN '1' THEN '在職' ELSE '委託訓練' END TPROPERTY ,CONVERT(decimal,ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST/CC.TNUM,0,1)) DEFGOVCOST ,CONVERT(decimal,ROUND(PP.DEFSTDCOST/CC.TNUM,0,1)) DEFSTDCOST ,IP.TPLANID,IP.PLANNAME ,KH.HOURRANNAME,KD.NAME ,PP.CAPAGE1,PP.CAPAGE2 ,ISNULL(PP.POINTYN,'N') POINTYN,ISNULL(PP.CREDPOINT,0) CREDPOINT ,CASE PP.CAPSEX WHEN 'F' THEN '女' WHEN 'M' THEN '男' ELSE '不分' END CAPSEX ,CASE PP.CAPMILITARY WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '0103' THEN '役畢(含免役)' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' ELSE '不分' END CAPMILITARY ,OO.ORGNAME,OP.ACTNO ,KT.TRAINEXPNAME,IC.CTID,IC.CTNAME CTNAME1,IZ.ZIPNAME,PP.CONTENT ,OP.ADDRESS,PP.CONTACTNAME PCONTACTNAME,OP.CONTACTNAME,PP.CONTACTPHONE,PP.CONTACTMOBILE,OP.PHONE ,PP.CAPOTHER1,PP.CAPOTHER2,PP.CAPOTHER3 ,OO.ORGKIND2,PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,PV.RECRUIT ,PV.SELMETHOD ,PV.ISiCAPCOUR ,PV.iCAPCOURDESC, PP.iCAPNUM,PP.iCAPMARKDATE ,PV.CAPALL ,ISNULL(PV.TGOVEXAM,'N') TGOVEXAM,PV.ENVZEROTRAIN,PV.GOVAGENAME,PV.TGOVEXAMNAME ,PV.MEMO8 ,PV.TRAINMODE ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT.ZIPCODE,PT.ZIP6W)+ IC2.CTNAME + IZ2.ZIPNAME + PT.ADDRESS +case when PT.PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT.PLACENAME,')') else '' end ADDRESS2 ,dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(PT2.ZIPCODE,PT2.ZIP6W)+ IC3.CTNAME + IZ3.ZIPNAME + PT2.ADDRESS +case when PT2.PLACENAME is not null then concat('(',PT2.PLACENAME,')') else '' end ADDRESS3 ,CONVERT(Varchar,PT.ZIPCODE) + IC2.CTNAME + IZ2.ZIPNAME + PT.ADDRESS HIDADDRESS2 ,CONVERT(Varchar,PT2.ZIPCODE) + IC3.CTNAME + IZ3.ZIPNAME + PT2.ADDRESS HIDADDRESS3 ,IC2.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,IC3.CTNAME CTNAME3 ,RR.ORGPLANNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR ON RR.RID =CC.RID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGPLANINFO OP ON OP.RSID=RR.RSID JOIN dbo.KEY_DEGREE KD ON KD.DEGREEID=PP.CAPDEGREE LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP IZ ON IZ.ZIPCODE=CC.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY IC ON IC.CTID =IZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE PT ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=PT.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP IZ2 ON IZ2.ZIPCODE=PT.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY IC2 ON IC2.CTID =IZ2.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE PT2 ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=PT2.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP IZ3 ON IZ3.ZIPCODE=PT2.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY IC3 ON IC3.CTID =IZ3.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN KH ON KH.HRID=CC.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINEXP KT ON KT.TEID=CC.TDEADLINE LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=OO.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO WHERE CC.TNUM>0 /*AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N'*/ AND IP.TPLANID='54' AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*OR CC.STDATE < CONVERT(date ,'2017/07/01')*/ AND ( CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() OR CAST(CC.STDATE AS DATE) > CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) ) AND CC.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT IP.TPLANID /*大計畫代碼*/ ,A.PLANID /*計劃代碼*/ ,A.COMIDNO /*辦訓單位ID*/ ,A.SEQNO ,A.OCID /*課程代碼*/ ,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,O.ORGNAME ORGNAME /*訓練單位*/ ,O.ORGID /*訓練單位ID*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.TADDRESSZIP) TADDRESSZIP ,D.CTNAME + C.ZIPNAME + A.TADDRESS TADDRESS /*訓練地點(位置)*/ ,B.CONTACTPHONE,B.CONTACTMOBILE /*聯絡電話*/ ,B.CONTACTNAME /*聯絡窗口*/ ,A.TPROPERTYID ,CASE A.TPROPERTYID WHEN 0 THEN '職前訓練' WHEN 1 THEN '在職訓練' WHEN 2 THEN '委託訓練' END TPROPERTY ,A.TNUM /*訓練學員數*/ ,S.CJOB_NO /*通俗職類代碼*/ ,S.CJOB_NAME /*通俗職類*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFSTDCOST, 0) DEFSTDCOST /*訓練費用-學員*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFGOVCOST, 0) DEFGOVCOST /*訓練費用-政府負擔*/ ,A.THOURS /*訓練時數*/ ,ISNULL(F.HOURRANNAME,'') HOURRANNAME /*訓練時段*/ ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE /*訓練日期*/ ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE /*報名日期*/ ,dbo.FN_STUDCOUNT(A.OCID,2) STUD_ENTERTYPE /*目前報名人數,自辦在職*/ ,A.EXAMDATE /*甄試日期*/ ,E2.EPNAME /*A.EXAMPERIOD 甄試日期時段*/ /* 以下轄區計畫適用:,02:自辦職前訓練,52:自辦職前訓練(青年職訓中心),64:主題產業模組化訓練,37:委外職前訓練 (還要認定為全日制),限定職前訓練, 訓練性質A.TPROPERTYID: 0.職前, 1.在職(進修), 2.委託訓練: */ ,CASE WHEN B.INVEXEM='Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN (A.PLANID IN ( '02','52','64' ) OR ( A.PLANID IN ( '37' ) AND A.ISFULLDATE='Y' ) ) AND A.TPROPERTYID='0' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END INVEXEM /*適用就保非自願離職免試入訓*/ ,ISNULL(B.ENTERPOINT,0) ENTERPOINT /*就保非自願離職免試入訓百分比*/ ,ISNULL(T.TRAINNAME,T.JOBNAME) TRAINNAME /*訓練職類*/ ,concat('緣由：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PLANCAUSE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'訓練目標：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURSCIENCE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'就業展望：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURTECH,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
') PURTECH /*訓練目標,訓練概要*/ ,CASE B.CAPSEX WHEN '0' THEN '不分' WHEN 'M' THEN '男' WHEN 'F' THEN '女' ELSE '' END CAPSEX /*參訓資格-性別*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE1) +CASE WHEN B.CAPAGE2 IS NULL THEN '以上即可' ELSE ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE2) END CAPAGE /*參訓資格-年齡*/ ,E.NAME CAPEDU /*參訓資格-學歷*/ ,CASE B.CAPMILITARY WHEN '00' THEN '不分' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '013' THEN '役畢(含免役)' ELSE B.CAPMILITARY END CAPMILITARY /*參訓資格-兵役*/ ,B.CAPOTHER1 /*參訓資格-其他條件1*/ ,B.CAPOTHER2 /*參訓資格-其他條件2*/ ,B.CAPOTHER3 /*參訓資格-其他條件3*/ ,CASE B.GETTRAIN1 WHEN 1 THEN '一律錄訓（無須參加甄選考試，持推介單者一律錄訓）' WHEN 2 THEN '甄選錄訓（詳招生簡章或其他說明）' WHEN 3 THEN '不適用推介機制' ELSE '' END GETTRAIN1 /*錄訓方式-持推介單*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( B.GETTRAIN2 ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN2 /*錄訓方式-自行報名*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(B.GETTRAIN3, ',', '，'), '1', '職業適性測驗'), '2', '筆試'), '3', '口試'), '4', '實作'), '5', '體能測驗'), '6', concat('其他: ',ISNULL(B.GETTRAIN3OTHER,'')) ) GETTRAIN3 /*錄訓方式-甄試方式*/ ,'權益說明 (固定內容)' EQUITY /*錄訓方式-權益說明 (固定內容)*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(REPLACE( REPLACE( GETTRAIN4, ',' ,'
'), '1', '上述甄試方式及主要內容逕洽承訓單位。'), '2', '上述甄試方式及主要內容概述如下：
' + GETTRAIN4OTHER) ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN4 /*錄訓方式-其他說明*/ ,ISNULL(B.NOTE,'')+'報名地點請逕洽培訓單位（ ('+dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(Q.ZIPCODE,Q.ZIPCODE6W)+')' +D1.CTNAME+C1.ZIPNAME + Q.ADDRESS + '；' +CASE WHEN Q.PHONE IS NOT NULL THEN ( CASE WHEN B.CONTACTPHONE <> Q.PHONE THEN Q.PHONE + '；' + B.CONTACTPHONE ELSE Q.PHONE END ) ELSE Q.PHONE END + ' ）' COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS NOTE /*錄訓方式-備註*/ ,A.NOTE3 ,U.NAME UNITNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO B ON A.PLANID=B.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=B.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=B.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C ON C.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D ON C.CTID=D.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE E ON B.CAPDEGREE=E.DEGREEID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN F ON F.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_MILITARY G ON G.MILITARYID=B.CAPMILITARY LEFT JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP P ON P.ORGID=O.ORGID AND P.RID=A.RID LEFT JOIN ORG_ORGPLANINFO Q ON Q.RSID=P.RSID JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=B.PLANID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY =A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE T ON T.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN KEY_EXAMPERIOD E2 ON E2.EPID=A.EXAMPERIOD LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C1 ON C1.ZIPCODE=Q.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D1 ON C1.CTID=D1.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_DISTRICT U ON IP.DISTID=U.DISTID WHERE A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' AND IP.TPLANID='06' /* AND A.TPROPERTYID <> '2',排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.OCID=#OCID# AND A.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() /*上架日 is not null 且 今天>=上架日才顯示課程明細*/

SELECT IP.TPLANID /*大計畫代碼*/ ,A.PLANID /*計劃代碼*/ ,A.COMIDNO /*辦訓單位ID*/ ,A.SEQNO ,A.OCID /*課程代碼*/ ,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,O.ORGNAME ORGNAME /*訓練單位*/ ,O.ORGID /*訓練單位ID*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.TADDRESSZIP) TADDRESSZIP ,D.CTNAME + C.ZIPNAME + A.TADDRESS TADDRESS /*訓練地點(位置)*/ ,B.CONTACTPHONE,B.CONTACTMOBILE /*聯絡電話*/ ,B.CONTACTNAME /*聯絡窗口*/ ,A.TPROPERTYID ,CASE A.TPROPERTYID WHEN 0 THEN '職前訓練' WHEN 1 THEN '在職訓練' WHEN 2 THEN '委託訓練' END TPROPERTY ,A.TNUM /*訓練學員數*/ ,S.CJOB_NO /*通俗職類代碼*/ ,S.CJOB_NAME /*通俗職類*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFSTDCOST, 0) DEFSTDCOST /*訓練費用-學員*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFGOVCOST, 0) DEFGOVCOST /*訓練費用-政府負擔*/ ,A.THOURS /*訓練時數*/ ,ISNULL(F.HOURRANNAME,'') HOURRANNAME /*訓練時段*/ ,A.STDATE ,A.FTDATE /*訓練日期*/ ,A.SENTERDATE ,A.FENTERDATE /*報名日期*/ ,dbo.FN_STUDCOUNT(A.OCID,5) STUD_ENTERTYPE /*目前報名人數,接受企業委託*/ ,A.EXAMDATE /*甄試日期*/ /* 以下轄區計畫適用:02:自辦職前訓練52:自辦職前訓練(青年職訓中心)64:主題產業模組化訓練37:委外職前訓練 (還要認定為全日制) */ /* 限定職前訓練, 訓練性質A.TPROPERTYID: 0.職前, 1.在職(進修), 2.委託訓練: */ /* 適用就保非自願離職免試入訓 */ ,CASE WHEN B.INVEXEM='Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN ( A.PLANID IN ('02','52','64') OR (A.PLANID IN ('37') AND A.ISFULLDATE='Y') ) AND A.TPROPERTYID='0' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END INVEXEM ,ISNULL(B.ENTERPOINT,0) ENTERPOINT /*就保非自願離職免試入訓百分比*/ ,ISNULL(T.TRAINNAME,T.JOBNAME) TRAINNAME /*訓練職類*/ ,concat('緣由：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PLANCAUSE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'訓練目標：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURSCIENCE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'就業展望：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURTECH,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
') PURTECH /*訓練目標,訓練概要*/ ,CASE B.CAPSEX WHEN '0' THEN '不分' WHEN 'M' THEN '男' WHEN 'F' THEN '女' ELSE '' END CAPSEX /*參訓資格-性別*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE1) + CASE WHEN B.CAPAGE2 IS NULL THEN '以上即可' ELSE ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE2) END CAPAGE /*參訓資格-年齡*/ ,E.NAME CAPEDU /*參訓資格-學歷*/ ,CASE B.CAPMILITARY WHEN '00' THEN '不分' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '013' THEN '役畢(含免役)' ELSE B.CAPMILITARY END CAPMILITARY /*參訓資格-兵役*/ ,B.CAPOTHER1 /*參訓資格-其他條件1*/ ,B.CAPOTHER2 /*參訓資格-其他條件2*/ ,B.CAPOTHER3 /*參訓資格-其他條件3*/ ,CASE B.GETTRAIN1 WHEN 1 THEN '一律錄訓（無須參加甄選考試，持推介單者一律錄訓）' WHEN 2 THEN '甄選錄訓（詳招生簡章或其他說明）' WHEN 3 THEN '不適用推介機制' ELSE '' END GETTRAIN1 /*錄訓方式-持推介單*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( B.GETTRAIN2 ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN2 /*錄訓方式-自行報名*/ /*錄訓方式-甄試方式*/ ,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(B.GETTRAIN3 ,',', '，'), '1', '職業適性測驗'),'2', '筆試'),'3', '口試'),'4', '實作'),'5', '體能測驗'),'6', '其他: ' + ISNULL(B.GETTRAIN3OTHER,'')) GETTRAIN3 ,'權益說明 (固定內容)' EQUITY /*錄訓方式-權益說明 (固定內容),錄訓方式-其他說明*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE( B.GETTRAIN4, ',' ,'
'), '1', '上述甄試方式及主要內容逕洽承訓單位。'), '2', '上述甄試方式及主要內容概述如下：
' + GETTRAIN4OTHER) ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN4 /*錄訓方式-備註*/ ,ISNULL(B.NOTE,'') +'報名地點請逕洽培訓單位（ (' + dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(Q.ZIPCODE,Q.ZIPCODE6W) + ')' + D1.CTNAME + C1.ZIPNAME + Q.ADDRESS + '；' + CASE WHEN Q.PHONE IS NOT NULL THEN ( CASE WHEN B.CONTACTPHONE <> Q.PHONE THEN Q.PHONE + '；' + B.CONTACTPHONE ELSE Q.PHONE END ) ELSE Q.PHONE END + ' ）' COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS NOTE ,A.NOTE3 ,U.NAME UNITNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO B ON A.PLANID=B.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=B.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=B.SEQNO LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C ON C.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D ON C.CTID=D.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE E ON B.CAPDEGREE=E.DEGREEID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN F ON F.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_MILITARY G ON G.MILITARYID=B.CAPMILITARY JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO LEFT JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP P ON P.ORGID=O.ORGID AND P.RID=A.RID LEFT JOIN ORG_ORGPLANINFO Q ON Q.RSID=P.RSID JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=B.PLANID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE T ON T.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C1 ON C1.ZIPCODE=Q.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D1 ON C1.CTID=D1.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_DISTRICT U ON IP.DISTID=U.DISTID WHERE A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' AND A.TPROPERTYID<>'1' AND A.TPROPERTYID='2' /* 接受企業委託-排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開) */ AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT IP.TPLANID /*大計畫代碼*/ ,A.PLANID /*計劃代碼*/ ,A.COMIDNO /*辦訓單位ID*/ ,A.SEQNO ,A.OCID /*課程代碼*/ ,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME ,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,O.ORGNAME ORGNAME /*訓練單位*/ ,O.ORGID /*訓練單位ID*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.TADDRESSZIP) TADDRESSZIP ,D.CTNAME + C.ZIPNAME + A.TADDRESS TADDRESS /*訓練地點(位置)*/ ,B.CONTACTPHONE,B.CONTACTMOBILE /*聯絡電話*/ ,B.CONTACTNAME /*聯絡窗口*/ ,A.TPROPERTYID ,CASE A.TPROPERTYID WHEN 0 THEN '職前訓練' WHEN 1 THEN '在職訓練' WHEN 2 THEN '委託訓練' END TPROPERTY ,A.TNUM /*訓練學員數*/ ,S.CJOB_NO /*通俗職類代碼*/ ,S.CJOB_NAME /*通俗職類*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFSTDCOST, 0) DEFSTDCOST /*訓練費用-學員*/ ,ISNULL(B.DEFGOVCOST, 0) DEFGOVCOST /*訓練費用-政府負擔*/ ,A.THOURS /*訓練時數*/ ,ISNULL(F.HOURRANNAME,'') HOURRANNAME /*訓練時段*/ ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE /*訓練日期*/ ,A.SENTERDATE ,A.FENTERDATE /*報名日期*/ ,dbo.FN_STUDCOUNT(A.OCID,4) STUD_ENTERTYPE /*目前報名人數,區域據點*/ ,A.EXAMDATE /*甄試日期*/ /* 以下轄區計畫適用:,02:自辦職前訓練,52:自辦職前訓練(青年職訓中心),64:主題產業模組化訓練,37:委外職前訓練 (還要認定為全日制),限定職前訓練, 訓練性質A.TPROPERTYID: 0.職前, 1.在職(進修), 2.委託訓練: */ ,CASE WHEN B.INVEXEM='Y' THEN 'Y' WHEN (A.PLANID IN ( '02','52','64' ) OR ( A.PLANID IN ( '37' ) AND A.ISFULLDATE='Y' ) ) AND A.TPROPERTYID='0' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END INVEXEM /*適用就保非自願離職免試入訓*/ ,ISNULL(B.ENTERPOINT,0) ENTERPOINT /*就保非自願離職免試入訓百分比*/ ,ISNULL(T.TRAINNAME,T.JOBNAME) TRAINNAME /*訓練職類*/ ,concat('緣由：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PLANCAUSE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'訓練目標：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURSCIENCE,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
' ,'就業展望：
',REPLACE(REPLACE(B.PURTECH,CHAR(10),''),CHAR(13),'
'),'
') PURTECH /*訓練目標,訓練概要*/ ,CASE B.CAPSEX WHEN '0' THEN '不分' WHEN 'M' THEN '男' WHEN 'F' THEN '女' ELSE '' END CAPSEX /*參訓資格-性別*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE1) + CASE WHEN B.CAPAGE2 IS NULL THEN '以上即可' ELSE ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.CAPAGE2) END CAPAGE /*參訓資格-年齡*/ ,E.NAME CAPEDU /*參訓資格-學歷*/ ,CASE B.CAPMILITARY WHEN '00' THEN '不分' WHEN '02' THEN '未役' WHEN '04' THEN '在役' WHEN '013' THEN '役畢(含免役)' ELSE B.CAPMILITARY END CAPMILITARY /*參訓資格-兵役*/ ,B.CAPOTHER1 /*參訓資格-其他條件1*/ ,B.CAPOTHER2 /*參訓資格-其他條件2*/ ,B.CAPOTHER3 /*參訓資格-其他條件3*/ ,CASE B.GETTRAIN1 WHEN 1 THEN '一律錄訓（無須參加甄選考試，持推介單者一律錄訓）' WHEN 2 THEN '甄選錄訓（詳招生簡章或其他說明）' WHEN 3 THEN '不適用推介機制' ELSE '' END GETTRAIN1 /*錄訓方式-持推介單*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( B.GETTRAIN2 ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN2 /*錄訓方式-自行報名*/ ,REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(REPLACE(B.GETTRAIN3, ',', '，'),'1', '職業適性測驗'), '2', '筆試'),'3', '口試'),'4', '實作'), '5', '體能測驗'),'6', concat('其他: ',B.GETTRAIN3OTHER)) GETTRAIN3 /*錄訓方式-甄試方式*/ , '權益說明 (固定內容)' EQUITY /*錄訓方式-權益說明 (固定內容)*/ ,REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(REPLACE( REPLACE( GETTRAIN4, ',' ,'
'), '1', '上述甄試方式及主要內容逕洽承訓單位。'), '2', '上述甄試方式及主要內容概述如下：
' + GETTRAIN4OTHER) ,CHAR(10),'' ), CHAR(13), '
' ) GETTRAIN4 /*錄訓方式-其他說明*/ ,ISNULL(B.NOTE,'') +'報名地點請逕洽培訓單位（ (' + dbo.FN_GET_ZIPCODE(Q.ZIPCODE,Q.ZIPCODE6W) + ')' +D1.CTNAME + C1.ZIPNAME + Q.ADDRESS + '；' +CASE WHEN Q.PHONE IS NOT NULL THEN ( CASE WHEN B.CONTACTPHONE <> Q.PHONE THEN Q.PHONE + '；' + B.CONTACTPHONE ELSE Q.PHONE END ) ELSE Q.PHONE END + ' ）' COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS NOTE /*錄訓方式-備註*/ ,A.NOTE3,U.NAME UNITNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO B ON A.PLANID=B.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=B.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=B.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=B.PLANID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C ON C.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D ON C.CTID=D.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE E ON B.CAPDEGREE=E.DEGREEID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN F ON F.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN KEY_MILITARY G ON G.MILITARYID=B.CAPMILITARY LEFT JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP P ON P.ORGID=O.ORGID AND P.RID=A.RID LEFT JOIN ORG_ORGPLANINFO Q ON Q.RSID=P.RSID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE T ON T.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP C1 ON C1.ZIPCODE=Q.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY D1 ON C1.CTID=D1.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_DISTRICT U ON IP.DISTID=U.DISTID WHERE A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' AND IP.TPLANID='70' /* AND A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' X 排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(PP.PLANID,'_',PP.COMIDNO,'_',PP.SEQNO) PCSVALUE ,CONCAT(PP.PLANID,'X',PP.SEQNO) PCSV ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE ,PP.MODIFYDATE PLANMODIFYDATE ,CC.MODIFYDATE CLASSMODIFYDATE ,V1.ORGNAME,V1.ORGKINDGW FROM PLAN_PLANINFO PP JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.PLANID=PP.PLANID AND CC.COMIDNO=PP.COMIDNO AND CC.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=PP.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME V1 ON V1.RID=PP.RID WHERE PP.ISAPPRPAPER='Y' /*限制為只有正式儲存之班級*/ AND PP.TRANSFLAG ='Y'/*已轉班*/ AND CC.PLANID=#PLANID# AND CC.OCID=#OCID# AND CC.RID=#RID#

SELECT a.PTDID,a.PLANID,a.COMIDNO,a.SEQNO ,a.PNAME,a.PHOUR,a.EHOUR,a.PCONT ,a.STRAINDATE,a.ETRAINDATE ,a.CLASSIFICATION1,a.CLASSIFICATION2 ,a.PTID,a.TECHID,a.TECHID2 FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC a WHERE a.PLANID=#PLANID# AND a.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO# AND a.SEQNO=#SEQNO# ORDER BY a.STRAINDATE ASC,a.PNAME ASC, a.PTDID ASC

SELECT a.PTDID,a.PLANID,a.COMIDNO,a.SEQNO ,a.PNAME,a.PHOUR,a.EHOUR,a.PCONT ,a.STRAINDATE,a.ETRAINDATE ,a.CLASSIFICATION1,a.CLASSIFICATION2 ,a.PTID,a.TECHID,a.TECHID2,a.FARLEARN ,t.TEACHCNAME,t2.TEACHCNAME TEACHCNAME2 FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC a LEFT JOIN TEACH_TEACHERINFO t on t.TECHID=a.TECHID LEFT JOIN TEACH_TEACHERINFO t2 on t2.TECHID=a.TECHID2 WHERE a.PLANID=#PLANID# AND a.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO# AND a.SEQNO=#SEQNO# ORDER BY a.STRAINDATE ASC,a.PNAME ASC,a.PTDID ASC
SELECT a.PNAME,a.PHOUR,a.EHOUR,a.PCONT FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC a WHERE a.PLANID=#PLANID# AND a.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO# AND a.SEQNO=#SEQNO# ORDER BY a.PTDID
SELECT a.PNAME,a.PHOUR,a.EHOUR,a.PCONT FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC a WHERE a.PLANID=#PLANID# AND a.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO# AND a.SEQNO=#SEQNO# ORDER BY a.PTDID

SELECT D.TEACHCNAME ,D.SCHOOLNAME,D.DEPARTMENT ,D.SPECIALTY1,D.SPECIALTY2,D.SPECIALTY3,D.SPECIALTY4,D.SPECIALTY5 ,D.EXPUNIT1,D.EXPYEARS1 ,D.EXPUNIT2,D.EXPYEARS2 ,D.EXPUNIT3,D.EXPYEARS3 FROM CLASS_TEACHER C LEFT JOIN TEACH_TEACHERINFO D ON C.TECHID=D.TECHID WHERE C.OCID=#OCID# AND ISNULL(C.TECHTYPE,'A')='A'

SELECT A.HN3ID ,A.SUBJECT ,CONVERT(Varchar,A.STOPSDATE,111)+' '+ CONVERT(Varchar,A.STOPSDATE,108) STOPSDATE ,CONVERT(Varchar,A.STOPEDATE,111)+' '+ CONVERT(Varchar,A.STOPEDATE,108) STOPEDATE ,CONVERT(Varchar,A.POSTDATE,111) POSTDATE ,AC.NAME MODIFYNAME FROM HOME_NEWS3 A JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AC ON AC.ACCOUNT =A.MODIFYACCT WHERE A.ISDELETE IS NULL AND A.POSTDATE<=GETDATE() AND A.STOPSDATE<=GETDATE() AND A.STOPEDATE>=GETDATE() ORDER BY A.STOPSDATE,A.STOPEDATE

SELECT A.HN4ID ,A.SUBJECT ,FORMAT(A.STOPSDATE,'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') STOPSDATE ,FORMAT(A.STOPEDATE,'yyyy/MM/dd HH:mm:ss') STOPEDATE ,FORMAT(A.POSTDATE, 'yyyy/MM/dd') POSTDATE ,AC.NAME MODIFYNAME FROM HOME_NEWS4 A JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AC ON AC.ACCOUNT =A.MODIFYACCT WHERE A.ISDELETE IS NULL AND A.POSTDATE<=GETDATE() AND A.STOPSDATE<=GETDATE() AND A.STOPEDATE>=GETDATE() ORDER BY A.STOPSDATE,A.STOPEDATE

/*--*/ WITH WC1 AS ( SELECT A.TPLANID,A.OCID,A.VIEWTIME,A.IP ,CONCAT(A.OCID,' ',B.CLASSCNAME) CLASSCNAME FROM TB_VIEWRECORD A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.OCID=B.OCID WHERE A.VIEWTIME>=GETDATE()-90 AND B.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND B.FTDATE>=GETDATE() AND A.TPLANID=#TPLANID# ) SELECT TOP 3 A.TPLANID,A.OCID,A.CLASSCNAME ,MAX(A.VIEWTIME) VIEWTIME FROM WC1 A /* AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM WC1 X WHERE X.IP=A.IP AND X.IP=#IP#) AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM WC1 X WHERE X.IP=A.IP AND A.IP<>#IP# AND X.OCID=#OCID#) */ GROUP BY A.TPLANID,A.OCID,A.CLASSCNAME ORDER BY 4

SELECT CC.OCID,concat(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM,CC.THOURS,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.AUTH_RELSHIP AR WITH(NOLOCK) ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN dbo.MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*AND CC.STDATE > GETDATE()*/ AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.STDATE + 15 > GETDATE() AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() /*可招生期間超過報名截止時間不顯示*/
AND IP.DISTID=#DISTID#
ORDER BY cc.STDATE, cc.OCID

SELECT A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS,A.TPERIOD,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,C.PLANNAME,D.NAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME,A.NOTE3 FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ID_PLAN B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G WITH(NOLOCK) ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H WITH(NOLOCK) ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E WITH(NOLOCK) ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F WITH(NOLOCK) ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J WITH(NOLOCK) ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=A.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=A.SEQNO */ WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND B.TPLANID='06' AND A.STDATE > GETDATE() /*未開訓*/ AND A.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() /*可招生期間超過報名截止時間不顯示*/
AND B.DISTID=#DISTID#
ORDER BY a.STDATE, a.OCID

SELECT A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS,A.TPERIOD ,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,C.PLANNAME,D.NAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME,A.NOTE3 FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ID_PLAN B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G WITH(NOLOCK) ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H WITH(NOLOCK) ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E WITH(NOLOCK) ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F WITH(NOLOCK) ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J WITH(NOLOCK) ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=A.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=A.SEQNO */ WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND B.TPLANID='70' AND A.STDATE > GETDATE() /*未開訓*/ AND A.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() /*可招生期間超過報名截止時間不顯示*/
AND B.DISTID=#DISTID#
ORDER BY a.STDATE, a.OCID
statements.sql:
SELECT TMID FROM dbo.KEY_TRAINTYPE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE 1=1
AND (TMID=#TMID# OR PARENT IN ($TMID$) )
statements.select:
WITH WT1 AS ( ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CC.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM,CC.THOURS,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.SENTERDATE, CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE, CC.FTDATE,CC.ISCLOSED ,CASE WHEN CC.TPROPERTYID='0' THEN '職前' WHEN CC.TPROPERTYID='1' THEN '在職' ELSE '委託訓練' END TPROPERTYID_TEXT ,OO.ORGNAME ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,pp.DISTANCE FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN WT1 ON WT1.TMID=CC.TMID /* LEFT JOIN dbo.MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP2.OCID=CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WITH(NOLOCK) ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ /* 2019-03-08 改成是查詢已報名結束的課程資料 */ WHERE CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() /*可招生期間超過報名截止時間不顯示*/ /* AND DBO.TRUNC_DATETIME(CC.STDATE)<=DBO.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) 撈已開訓的班 */ AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' /*非企業專班*/ AND IP.TPLANID='28' /*產投計畫*/ AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*不開班為否 (即開班)*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL
AND CC.KID20_NOSHOW IS NULL /*政策性課程，但不顯示於前台*/ AND (dbo.FN_CHK_KID20(cc.OCID)>0 OR dbo.FN_CHK_KID25(cc.OCID,cc.STDATE)>0) /*2025政策性課程專區*/
AND UPPER(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND CC.STDATE>=CONVERT(DATE , #STDATE#)
AND CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE , #FTDATE#)
/* AND upper(PP2.TEACHCNAME1) LIKE N'%'+upper(#TEACHCNAME#)+'%' */ AND dbo.FN_GET_TRAINDESC(cc.PLANID,cc.COMIDNO,cc.SEQNO,'TN1B') LIKE N'%'+#TEACHCNAME#+'%'
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
AND CC.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO#
AND UPPER(OO.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#SCHOOLNAME#)+'%'
$WEEKS_Sql$
AND CC.OCID=#OCID#
AND OO.ORGKIND2=#ORGKIND#
AND PP.CLASSCATE=#CLASSCATE#
AND TT.JOBTMID=#JOBTMID#
/*AND CC.TMID=#TMID#*/ /*策略性產業篩選*/ AND TT.TMID=#TMID#
AND ISNULL(PV.TGOVEXAM,'N')=#TGOVEXAM#
AND ( 1<>1 OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WHERE PT.PLANID=pp.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=pp.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=pp.SEQNO AND upper(PT.PCONT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%') OR upper(CC.CONTENT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSENGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%')
)
) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

WITH WT1 AS ( ) SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2, CC.TNUM, CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1, TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.SENTERDATE, CC.FENTERDATE ,CC.STDATE, CC.FTDATE ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CASE WHEN CC.TPROPERTYID='0' THEN '職前' WHEN CC.TPROPERTYID='1' THEN '在職' ELSE '委託訓練' END TPROPERTYID_TEXT ,OO.ORGNAME ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,pp.DISTANCE FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN WT1 ON WT1.TMID=CC.TMID /* LEFT JOIN dbo.MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP2.OCID=CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT WITH(NOLOCK) ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC WITH(NOLOCK) ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WITH(NOLOCK) ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ /* 2019-03-08 改成是查詢已報名結束的課程資料 */ WHERE CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() /* AND DBO.TRUNC_DATETIME(CC.STDATE)<=DBO.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) 撈已開訓的班 */ AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' /*非企業專班*/ AND IP.TPLANID='28' /*產投計畫*/ AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*不開班為否 (即開班)*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL
AND CC.KID20_NOSHOW IS NULL /* 政策性課程，但不顯示於前台 */ AND (dbo.FN_CHK_KID20(cc.OCID)>0 OR dbo.FN_CHK_KID25(cc.OCID,cc.STDATE)>0) /*2025政策性課程專區*/
AND UPPER(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND CC.STDATE>=CONVERT(DATE , #STDATE#)
AND CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE , #FTDATE#)
/* AND upper(PP2.TEACHCNAME1) LIKE N'%'+upper(#TEACHCNAME#)+'%' */ AND dbo.FN_GET_TRAINDESC(cc.PLANID,cc.COMIDNO,cc.SEQNO,'TN1B') LIKE N'%'+#TEACHCNAME#+'%'
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
AND CC.COMIDNO=#COMIDNO#
AND UPPER(OO.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#SCHOOLNAME#)+'%'
$WEEKS_Sql$
AND CC.OCID=#OCID#
AND OO.ORGKIND2=#ORGKIND#
AND PP.CLASSCATE=#CLASSCATE#
AND TT.JOBTMID=#JOBTMID#
/*AND CC.TMID=#TMID#*/ /*策略性產業篩選*/ AND TT.TMID=#TMID#
AND ISNULL(PV.TGOVEXAM,'N')=#TGOVEXAM#
AND ( 1<>1 OR (EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT WHERE PT.PLANID=pp.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=pp.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=pp.SEQNO AND upper(PT.PCONT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%') OR upper(CC.CONTENT) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%' OR upper(CC.CLASSENGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#KEYWORDS_list[]#)+'%')
)
) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT CC.OCID,CC.ORGNAME,CC.CLASSCNAME2 CLASSCNAME ,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CF.CONFIRDATE,CF.CONFIRACCT ,AA.NAME CONFIRNAME ,CF.CFGUID,CF.CFSEQNO ,CF.ODNUMBER FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC JOIN dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN dbo.AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.CONFIRACCT WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND CC.TPLANID='28' AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)>=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE) AS DATE) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)<=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE+29) AS DATE) /*公告日起算30天內為可顯示的期間範圍*/
AND CC.OCID=#OCID#
AND upper(CC.CLASSCNAME2) LIKE '%'+ upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND upper(CC.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#ORGNAME#)+'%'
ORDER BY CF.CONFIRDATE,CF.CFSEQNO

SELECT CC.OCID ,CC.ORGNAME,CC.CLASSCNAME2 CLASSCNAME ,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CF.CONFIRDATE,CF.CONFIRACCT ,AA.NAME CONFIRNAME,CF.CFGUID,CF.CFSEQNO ,dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE)+'至'+dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29) CONFIRDATERANGE /*公告期間*/ ,CF.ODNUMBER ,OO.ORGNAME CFORGNAME FROM VIEW2 CC JOIN CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT=CF.CONFIRACCT LEFT JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO ON AA.ORGID=OO.ORGID WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND CAST(CF.CONFIRDATE AS DATE)<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND CC.TPLANID='28' AND CF.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT CASE WHEN VP.TPLANID='28' THEN VP.PLANNAME+'（'+RR.ORGPLANNAME+'）' ELSE VP.PLANNAME +'' END TOPTITLE2 ,CC.CLASSCNAME+ '-學員參訓名單' COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS TOPTITLE3 /* ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CS.STUDENTID) ROWNUM2 */ ,DBO.LPAD( ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CS.STUDENTID), 2, '0') ROWNUM2 ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,CC.OCID ,SUBSTRING(SS.NAME,1,1)+'○'+SUBSTRING(SS.NAME,3,LEN(SS.NAME) - 2) STUDNAME2 /* '******'+SUBSTRING(SS.IDNO,-4,4) IDNO2,*/ /*'******'+reverse(substring(REVERSE(SS.IDNO),1,4)) IDNO2,*/ ,'******'+right(SS.IDNO,4) IDNO2 /* ,SUBSTR(SS.IDNO,1,1)+'*****'+SUBSTR(SS.IDNO,-4,4) IDNO2,SS.NAME STUDNAME,SS.IDNO */ ,CS.STUDENTID,DBO.FN_CSTUDID2(CS.STUDENTID) STUDID2,SF.SETID,SF.ENTERDATE,SF.SERNUM,CS.SOCID,SF.STUDMODE /*,DECODE(SF.STUDMODE,'2','離訓','3','退訓','A','遞補學員') STUDMODE_N */ /*,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '退訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='A' THEN '遞補學員' ELSE '' END STUDMODE_N*/ ,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '已離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '已退訓' ELSE isnull(ks.name,'') END STUDMODE_N /*甄試結果：01 正取,02 備取, 03 未錄取*/ ,'公告日期：'+DBO.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE) CONFIRDATE ,'公告期間：'+DBO.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE)+'至'+DBO.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29) CONFIRDATE2 ,'文號：'+CF.ODNUMBER ODNUMBER FROM dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF JOIN dbo.STUD_CONFIRM SF ON SF.OCID=CF.OCID AND SF.CFSEQNO=CF.CFSEQNO JOIN dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS ON CS.SOCID =SF.SOCID AND CS.OCID =SF.OCID JOIN dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO SS ON SS.SID=CS.SID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID=CF.OCID JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR ON RR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.V_ENTERTYPE ve on sf.OCID=ve.OCID1 AND sf.SETID=ve.SETID and sf.ENTERDATE=ve.ENTERDATE and sf.SERNUM=ve.SERNUM JOIN STUD_SELRESULT st on st.SETID=ve.SETID and st.ENTERDATE=ve.ENTERDATE and st.SERNUM=ve.SERNUM AND st.OCID=ve.OCID1 LEFT JOIN KEY_SELRESULT ks ON st.SelResultID=ks.SelResultID WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND VP.TPLANID='28' AND CF.OCID=#OCID# AND CF.CFGUID=#CFGUID# AND CF.CFSEQNO=#CFSEQNO# ORDER BY CS.STUDENTID

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ASC) SEQNO ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.SENTERDATE,120) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.FENTERDATE,120) REGBETWEEN ,A.SENTERDATE REGSDATE ,A.FENTERDATE REGEDATE ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.STDATE,111) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.FTDATE,111) TRAINBETWEEN ,CAST(A.STDATE AS DATE) TRAINSDATE ,CAST(A.FTDATE AS DATE) TRAINEDATE ,A.TPERIOD,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,CASE A.TPROPERTYID WHEN '0' THEN '職前訓練' WHEN '1' THEN '在職訓練' WHEN '2' THEN '委託訓練' END TRAINATTR ,C.PLANNAME,D.NAME TRAINCENTER,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME,CF.CONFIRDATE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ID_PLAN B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G WITH(NOLOCK) ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I WITH(NOLOCK) ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H WITH(NOLOCK) ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K WITH(NOLOCK) ON K.TMID=A.TMID JOIN CLASS_CONFIRM CF WITH(NOLOCK) ON CF.OCID=A.OCID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S WITH(NOLOCK) ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E WITH(NOLOCK) ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F WITH(NOLOCK) ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J WITH(NOLOCK) ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD LEFT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.ROVEDACCT LEFT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA2 WITH(NOLOCK) ON AA2.ACCOUNT =CF.ANNMENTACCT WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ AND B.TPLANID='06' AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)>=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE) AS DATE) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)<=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE+29) AS DATE) /*公告日起算30天內為可顯示的期間範圍*/
AND B.DISTID=#DISTIDITEM#
AND A.OCID=#OCID#
AND upper(A.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ASC) SEQNO ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,A.OCID ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.SENTERDATE,120) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.FENTERDATE,120) REGBETWEEN ,A.SENTERDATE REGSDATE ,A.FENTERDATE REGEDATE ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.STDATE,111) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,A.FTDATE,111) TRAINBETWEEN ,CAST(A.STDATE AS DATE) TRAINSDATE ,CAST(A.FTDATE AS DATE) TRAINEDATE ,A.TPERIOD,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,CASE A.TPROPERTYID WHEN '0' THEN '職前訓練' WHEN '1' THEN '在職訓練' WHEN '2' THEN '委託訓練' END TRAINATTR ,C.PLANNAME,D.NAME TRAINCENTER,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME,CF.CONFIRDATE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ID_PLAN B ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K ON K.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD JOIN CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=A.OCID LEFT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.ROVEDACCT LEFT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA2 ON AA2.ACCOUNT =CF.ANNMENTACCT WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ AND B.TPLANID='06' AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT CF.OCID,CF.CFGUID,CF.CFSEQNO,B.EXAMNO ,B.NAME STUDNAME,B.IDNO ,CASE WHEN B.EXAMPLUS=1 THEN '是' END EXAMPLUS /* SF.STUDMODE, */ ,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '退訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='A' THEN '遞補學員' ELSE '' END STUDMODE ,SUBSTRING(B.NAME,1,1)+'○'+SUBSTRING(B.NAME,3,LEN(B.NAME) - 2) STUDNAME2 /*'******'+reverse(substring(REVERSE(B.IDNO),1,4)) IDNO2,*/ ,'******'+right(B.IDNO,4) IDNO2 ,KK.NAME EIDENTITY ,ST.SUMOFGRAD FROM dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CF.OCID =CC.OCID JOIN dbo.STUD_CONFIRM SF ON SF.OCID=CF.OCID AND SF.CFSEQNO=CF.CFSEQNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR ON RR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.V_ENTERTYPE B ON SF.OCID=B.OCID1 AND SF.SETID=B.SETID AND SF.ENTERDATE=B.ENTERDATE AND SF.SERNUM=B.SERNUM JOIN dbo.STUD_SELRESULT ST ON ST.SETID=B.SETID AND ST.ENTERDATE=B.ENTERDATE AND ST.SERNUM=B.SERNUM AND ST.OCID=B.OCID1 LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_IDENTITY KK ON KK.IDENTITYID=B.EIDENTITYID /* LEFT JOIN dbo.MVIEW_RELSHIP23 R3 ON R3.RID3=CC.RID AND R3.PLANID=CC.PLANID */ WHERE ST.ADMISSION='Y' AND VP.TPLANID='06'
AND CF.OCID=#OCID#
AND CF.CFGUID=#CFGUID#
AND CF.CFSEQNO=#CFSEQNO#
ORDER BY ST.SELRESULTID,ST.SELSORT,B.EXAMNO

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.OCID ASC) SEQNO ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.OCID ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO ,CC.CLASSCNAME2 TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.SENTERDATE,120) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.FENTERDATE,120) REGBETWEEN ,CC.SENTERDATE REGSDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE REGEDATE ,CC.CYCLTYPE ,CC.THOURS ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.STDATE,111) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.FTDATE,111) TRAINBETWEEN ,CAST(CC.STDATE AS DATE) TRAINSDATE ,CAST(CC.FTDATE AS DATE) TRAINEDATE ,CC.TPERIOD ,CC.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,CC.TPROPERTY TRAINATTR ,CC.PLANNAME ,CC.DISTNAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(CC.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,CC.CAPDEGREE TRAINEDGE ,CC.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,CC.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,CC.CJOBNAME ,CF.CONFIRDATE ,CF.ROVEDACCT /*審核*/ ,CF.ANNMENTACCT /*公告*/ ,CF.ANNMENTDATE /*公告日期*/ FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC JOIN CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.ROVEDACCT JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA2 ON AA2.ACCOUNT =CF.ANNMENTACCT WHERE CF.ANNMENTACCT IS NOT NULL /*公告*/ AND CC.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND CC.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND CC.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ AND CC.TPLANID='70' /* 公告日起算30天內為可顯示的期間範圍 */ AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)>=CAST((CF.ANNMENTDATE) AS DATE) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)<=CAST((CF.ANNMENTDATE+29) AS DATE)
AND CC.DISTID=#DISTIDITEM#
AND CC.OCID=#OCID#
AND upper(CC.CLASSCNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.OCID ASC) SEQNO ,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.OCID ,CC.CLASSCNAME2 TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.SENTERDATE,120) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.FENTERDATE,120) REGBETWEEN ,CC.SENTERDATE REGSDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE REGEDATE ,CC.CYCLTYPE ,CC.THOURS ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.STDATE,111) + ' ～ ' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.FTDATE,111) TRAINBETWEEN ,CAST(CC.STDATE AS DATE) TRAINSDATE ,CAST(CC.FTDATE AS DATE) TRAINEDATE ,CC.TPERIOD,CC.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,CC.TPROPERTY TRAINATTR ,CC.PLANNAME ,CC.DISTNAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(CC.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,CC.CAPDEGREE TRAINEDGE ,CC.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,CC.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,CC.CJOBNAME ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO ,CF.CONFIRDATE ,concat(dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE),'至',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29)) CONFIRDATERANGE /*公告期間*/ /*文號 ,CONCAT(CF.ODNUMBER,'字 第',CF.ODNUMBER2,'號') ODNUMBER */ ,CF.ODNUMBER /*文號*/ ,CF.ODNUMBER2 /*文號2*/ ,FO.ORGNAME CFORGNAME /*發布單位 審核*/ ,CF.ANNMENTDATE /*公告日期*/ ,concat(dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.ANNMENTDATE),'至',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.ANNMENTDATE+29)) ANNMENTDATERANGE /*公告期間*/ FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC JOIN dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.ROVEDACCT JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO FO ON FO.ORGID=AA.ORGID JOIN AUTH_ACCOUNT AA2 ON AA2.ACCOUNT =CF.ANNMENTACCT WHERE CC.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND CC.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND CC.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ and CF.ODNUMBER IS NOT NULL AND CC.TPLANID='70' AND CC.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT CF.OCID,CF.CFGUID,CF.CFSEQNO ,B.EXAMNO ,B.NAME STUDNAME ,B.IDNO ,CASE WHEN B.EXAMPLUS=1 THEN '是' END EXAMPLUS /* SF.STUDMODE, */ ,SUBSTRING(B.NAME,1,1)+'○'+SUBSTRING(B.NAME,3,LEN(B.NAME) - 2) STUDNAME2 /*'******'+reverse(substring(REVERSE(B.IDNO),1,4)) IDNO2,*/ ,'******'+right(B.IDNO,4) IDNO2 ,KK.NAME EIDENTITY ,ST.SUMOFGRAD /* ,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '退訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='A' THEN '遞補學員' ELSE '' END STUDMODE */ ,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '已離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '已退訓' ELSE isnull(ks.name,'') END STUDMODE_N /*甄試結果：01 正取,02 備取, 03 未錄取*/ ,'公告日期：'+dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE) CONFIRDATE ,'公告期間：'+dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE)+'至'+dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29) CONFIRDATE2 ,'文號：'+CF.ODNUMBER ODNUMBER FROM dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CF.OCID =CC.OCID JOIN dbo.STUD_CONFIRM SF ON SF.OCID=CF.OCID AND SF.CFSEQNO=CF.CFSEQNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR ON RR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.V_ENTERTYPE B ON SF.OCID=B.OCID1 AND SF.SETID=B.SETID AND SF.ENTERDATE=B.ENTERDATE AND SF.SERNUM=B.SERNUM JOIN dbo.STUD_SELRESULT ST ON ST.SETID=B.SETID AND ST.ENTERDATE=B.ENTERDATE AND ST.SERNUM=B.SERNUM AND ST.OCID=B.OCID1 LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_SELRESULT ks ON st.SelResultID=ks.SelResultID LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_IDENTITY KK ON KK.IDENTITYID=B.EIDENTITYID WHERE ST.ADMISSION='Y' AND VP.TPLANID='70'
AND CF.OCID=#OCID#
AND CF.CFGUID=#CFGUID#
AND CF.CFSEQNO=#CFSEQNO#
ORDER BY ST.SELRESULTID,ST.SELSORT,B.EXAMNO
SELECT a.NAME DISTNAME,a.DISTID FROM ID_DISTRICT a WHERE a.DISTID in ('001','003','004','005','006') ORDER BY a.DISTID

SELECT CC.OCID ,CC.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME2 CLASSCNAME ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CF.CONFIRDATE ,CF.CONFIRACCT ,AA.NAME CONFIRNAME ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC JOIN dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN dbo.AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT =CF.CONFIRACCT WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND CC.TPLANID='54' /*公告日起算30天內為可顯示的期間範圍*/ AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)>=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE) AS DATE) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)<=CAST((CF.CONFIRDATE+29) AS DATE) /* AND CC.DISTID */
AND upper(CC.CLASSCNAME2) LIKE '%'+ upper(#CLASSCNAME#)+'%'
AND upper(CC.ORGNAME) LIKE '%'+upper(#ORGNAME#)+'%'
ORDER BY CF.CONFIRDATE,CF.CFSEQNO

SELECT CC.OCID ,CC.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME2 CLASSCNAME ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CF.CONFIRDATE ,CF.CONFIRACCT ,AA.NAME CONFIRNAME ,CF.CFGUID ,CF.CFSEQNO ,concat(dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE),'至',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29)) CONFIRDATERANGE /*公告期間*/ ,CF.ODNUMBER ,OO.ORGNAME CFORGNAME FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC JOIN dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF ON CF.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN dbo.AUTH_ACCOUNT AA ON AA.ACCOUNT=CF.CONFIRACCT LEFT JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO ON AA.ORGID=OO.ORGID WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND CAST(CF.CONFIRDATE AS DATE)<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND CC.TPLANID='54' AND CF.OCID=#OCID# AND CF.CFGUID=#CFGUID# AND CF.CFSEQNO=#CFSEQNO# ORDER BY CF.CONFIRDATE DESC

SELECT dbo.FN_GET_PLANKIND3(rr.ORGKIND2,vp.TPLANID,vp.PLANNAME) TOPTITLE2 ,concat(CC.CLASSCNAME,'-學員參訓名單') TOPTITLE3 ,dbo.LPAD( ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY CS.STUDENTID), 2, '0') ROWNUM2 ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,pp.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,CC.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_MASK3(SS.NAME) STUDNAME2 /* ,dbo.FN_GET_MASK1(SS.IDNO) IDNO2 */ ,'******'+right(SS.IDNO,4) IDNO2 ,CS.STUDENTID ,dbo.FN_CSTUDID2(CS.STUDENTID) STUDID2 ,SF.SETID ,SF.ENTERDATE ,SF.SERNUM ,CS.SOCID ,SF.STUDMODE /*,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '退訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='A' THEN '遞補學員' ELSE '' END STUDMODE_N */ ,CASE WHEN SF.STUDMODE='2' THEN '已離訓' WHEN SF.STUDMODE='3' THEN '已退訓' ELSE isnull(ks.name,'') END STUDMODE_N /*甄試結果：01 正取,02 備取, 03 未錄取*/ ,concat('公告日期：',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE)) CONFIRDATE ,concat('公告期間：',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE),'至',dbo.FN_CDATE(CF.CONFIRDATE+29)) CONFIRDATE2 ,concat('文號：',CF.ODNUMBER) ODNUMBER FROM dbo.CLASS_CONFIRM CF JOIN dbo.STUD_CONFIRM SF ON SF.OCID=CF.OCID AND SF.CFSEQNO=CF.CFSEQNO JOIN dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS ON CS.SOCID =SF.SOCID AND CS.OCID =SF.OCID JOIN dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO SS ON SS.SID=CS.SID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID=CF.OCID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO pp ON pp.PLANID=cc.PLANID AND pp.COMIDNO=cc.COMIDNO AND pp.SEQNO=cc.SEQNO JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN VP ON VP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.VIEW_RIDNAME RR ON RR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.V_ENTERTYPE ve on sf.OCID=ve.OCID1 AND sf.SETID=ve.SETID and sf.ENTERDATE=ve.ENTERDATE and sf.SERNUM=ve.SERNUM JOIN dbo.STUD_SELRESULT st on st.SETID=ve.SETID and st.ENTERDATE=ve.ENTERDATE and st.SERNUM=ve.SERNUM AND st.OCID=ve.OCID1 LEFT JOIN dbo.KEY_SELRESULT ks ON st.SelResultID=ks.SelResultID WHERE ISNULL(CF.ODNUMBER,'N')!='N' /* 公文號 */ AND CAST(CF.CONFIRDATE AS DATE)<=CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) AND vp.TPLANID='54' AND CF.OCID=#OCID# AND CF.CFGUID=#CFGUID# AND CF.CFSEQNO=#CFSEQNO# ORDER BY CS.STUDENTID

SELECT SEQNO, FUNID, C_SDATE, C_EDATE, C_TITLE, C_CONTENT1, C_CONTENT2, C_CONTENT3 ,C_CDATE, C_CACCT, C_UDATE, C_UACCT, C_STATUS, C_VFILE1, C_PFILE1, C_FUNCITEM ,C_CTRLITEM, SUB_FUNID, C_URL ,C_LINKURL3 FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE C_STATUS <> 'D' AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) /*在發佈期間內*/ AND FUNID=#FUNID# AND SUB_FUNID=#SUB_FUNID# ORDER BY SEQNO ASC

SELECT SEQNO, FUNID, C_SDATE, C_EDATE, C_TITLE ,C_CONTENT1, C_CONTENT2, C_CONTENT3 ,C_CDATE, C_CACCT, C_UDATE, C_UACCT, C_STATUS ,C_VFILE1, C_PFILE1, C_FUNCITEM ,C_CTRLITEM, SUB_FUNID, C_URL ,C_LINKURL3 FROM TB_CONTENT WHERE C_STATUS <> 'D' AND DATEDIFF(MI,C_SDATE,GETDATE()) >=0 AND (C_EDATE IS NULL OR DATEDIFF(MI,GETDATE(),C_EDATE) >=0) /*在發佈期間內*/ AND FUNID=#FUNID# AND SEQNO=#SEQNO#
SELECT CODE, DESCR AS TEXT FROM CODE1 WHERE HIST='Y' AND ITEM='DLPLAN' ORDER BY CODE /* UNION SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR(10), '99') AS CODE, CONVERT(NVARCHAR(140), '全部資料') AS TEXT ORDER BY CODE ASC */

SELECT a.DLID, a.KINDID, ISNULL((SELECT DESCR FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM='DLKIND' AND CODE COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS=a.KINDID COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS), '') KIND_NAME, a.PLANID, ISNULL((SELECT DESCR FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM='DLPLAN' AND CODE COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS=a.PLANID COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS), '') PLAN_NAME, a.DLTITLE, a.FILE1_NAME, a.FILE1_TYPE, a.FILE1_SIZE, a.FILE2_NAME, a.FILE2_TYPE, a.FILE2_SIZE, a.START_DATE, a.END_DATE, a.DLCOUNT, a.UPLOADDATE, a.ISUSED, a.MEMO, a.MODIFYACCT, a.MODIFYDATE FROM TB_DLFILE a WHERE a.ISUSED='Y' AND a.KINDID=#KINDID# AND CONVERT(VARCHAR, GETDATE(), 111)<=CONVERT(VARCHAR, ISNULL(a.END_DATE, GETDATE()), 111)
AND ISNULL(a.PLANID, '0')=#PLANID#
ORDER BY START_DATE DESC, KINDID ASC, ISNULL(a.PLANID, '0') ASC

SELECT DLID, KINDID, PLANID, DLTITLE, FILE1_NAME, FILE1_TYPE, FILE1_SIZE ,FILE2_NAME, FILE2_TYPE, FILE2_SIZE, START_DATE, END_DATE, DLCOUNT ,UPLOADDATE, ISUSED, MEMO, MODIFYACCT, MODIFYDATE FROM TB_DLFILE WHERE DLID=#DLID#

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1 ,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP AR ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.STDATE + 15 > GETDATE() AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE()
AND CC.TMID in ($TMID$)
