AND (SIZ.CTID in ($CTID$) OR TIZ.CTID in ($CTID$))
) TB ORDER BY TB.STDATE, TB.FENTERDATE DESC, TB.OCID

SELECT T.* FROM ( SELECT A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) TRAINCLASS /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.THOURS,A.TPERIOD ,J.HOURRANNAME TPERIODNAME ,C.PLANNAME ,D.NAME TRAINCENTER ,ISNULL(F.CTNAME,'其他') TRAINPLACE ,H.NAME TRAINEDGE ,J.HOURRANNAME TRAINTIME ,I.ORGNAME TRAINORG ,S.CJOB_NAME CJOBNAME FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ID_PLAN B ON B.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C ON C.TPLANID=B.TPLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT D ON D.DISTID=B.DISTID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN KEY_DEGREE H ON H.DEGREEID=G.CAPDEGREE JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE K ON K.TMID=A.TMID LEFT JOIN SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=A.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP E ON E.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP LEFT JOIN ID_CITY F ON F.CTID=E.CTID LEFT JOIN KEY_HOURRAN J ON J.HRID=A.TPERIOD /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=A.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=A.SEQNO */ WHERE A.TPROPERTYID <> '2' /*排除企業委託訓練課程(不公開)*/ AND A.NOTOPEN<>'Y' /*排除不開班*/ AND A.ISSUCCESS='Y' /*轉入成功資料*/ AND A.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL /*排除在E網不顯示*/ /*直接以 TPLANID='06' 在職訓練計畫取代其他條件*/ /*AND B.TPLANID NOT IN ('15','28','36','45','54') AND ( A.TPROPERTYID='1' OR B.TPLANID IN ('46','47') )*/ AND B.TPLANID='06' AND A.STDATE > GETDATE() /*一般課程查詢（未開訓）*/
AND B.DISTID IN ( $DISTID$ )
AND A.CJOB_UNKEY IN ($CJOBUNKEY$)
) T ORDER BY T.SENTERDATE, T.FENTERDATE, T.STDATE, T.FTDATE, T.OCID

SELECT 1 FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 SE1 JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 SE2 ON SE1.ESETID=SE2.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID=SE2.OCID1 JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID WHERE IP.TPLANID='28' AND SE1.IDNO=#IDNO# AND SE1.BIRTHDAY=CAST(#BIRTHDAY# AS DATE)

SELECT CC.RID ,CC.CLASSCNAME ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.OCID /*OCID->OCIDID*/ ,CS.SOCID ,SC.APPLIEDSTATUS /*審核中為NULL*/ ,SC.ALLOTDATE /*撥款日期*/ ,SC.APPLIEDSTATUSM ,SC.SUMOFMONEY ,SC.SOCID SC_SOCID ,IP.YEARS ,CS.WORKSUPPIDENT ,IP.PLANNAME ,IP.TPLANID FROM dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=CS.OCID JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO SS WITH(NOLOCK) ON SS.SID=CS.SID LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_SUBSIDYCOST SC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SC.SOCID =CS.SOCID WHERE ( IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1A$) OR ( IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1B$) AND CS.WORKSUPPIDENT='Y' /*是否為在職者補助身份 Y:是*/ AND CC.STDATE>=CAST('2010/04/01' AS DATE) ) ) AND SS.IDNO=#IDNO# AND SS.BIRTHDAY=CAST(CONVERT(VARCHAR,#BIRTHDAY#) AS DATE) ORDER BY IP.YEARS, CC.STDATE

SELECT SE2.ESERNUM ,SE2.ESETID ,SE2.RELENTERDATE ,SE2.SIGNUPMEMO ,SE1.IDNO ,SE1.BIRTHDAY ,CC.OCID ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE /* ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.STDATE,111) || '
~
' || CONVERT(VARCHAR,CC.FTDATE,111) TROUND */ ,IP.YEARS ,IP.PLANNAME ,IP.DISTNAME ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME ,CC.THOURS ,CC.TNUM ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(SE2.SIGNNO,-1)=-1 AND IP.YEARS>='2014' AND IP.TPLANID='28' THEN '線上收件失敗' /*2014年後 失敗*/ WHEN ISNULL(SE2.SIGNNO,-1)!=-1 AND IP.YEARS>='2014' AND IP.TPLANID='28' THEN '線上收件成功
序號：' + CONVERT(VARCHAR,SE2.SIGNNO) /*2014年後 成功*/ ELSE '線上已收件' END SIGNNO_TEXT /*舊年度資料*/ ,SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS /*,DECODE(SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS,0,NULL,1,'審核中',2,'不通過',3,'正取',4,'備取',5,'未錄取','未錄取') SIGNUPSTATUS_TEXT*/ ,CASE WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 THEN NULL WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=1 THEN '審核中' WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=2 THEN '不通過' WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=3 THEN '正取' WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=4 THEN '備取' WHEN SE2.SIGNUPSTATUS=5 THEN '未錄取' ELSE '未錄取' END SIGNUPSTATUS_TEXT ,DBO.FN_GET_PLAN_ONCLASS(CC.PLANID,CC.COMIDNO,CC.SEQNO,'WEEKTIME') WEEKS2 /*上課期間*/ ,ROUND(PP.TOTALCOST /PP.TNUM,0) TOTALCOST ,ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST /PP.TNUM,0) DEFGOVCOST ,GETDATE() ANOW /* 若超過開訓日 且超過報名結束日 則為1 否為0 (1:啟動'未錄取 顯示功能。) */ ,CASE WHEN CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) AND ISNULL(CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE)<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END XDAY1 /* 6個月內的報名資料，供計算使用金額比較使用。 */ ,CASE WHEN SE2.ENTERDATE>=CONVERT(date,DATEADD(MM,-6,GETDATE())) AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)

SELECT PT.PTDID ,PT.STRAINDATE ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,PT.STRAINDATE,111) + DBO.SUBSTR(PT.PNAME,1,5) STRAINDATE1 ,CONVERT(VARCHAR,PT.STRAINDATE,111) + DBO.SUBSTR2(PT.PNAME,-5) STRAINDATE2 /*,TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PT.STRAINDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD ') || SUBSTR(PT.PNAME,1,5),'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') STRAINDATE1_DT*/ ,CAST(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR,PT.STRAINDATE,111),'/','-') +' '+DBO.SUBSTR(PT.PNAME,1,5)+':00.000' AS DATETIME) STRAINDATE1_DT /*,TO_DATE(TO_CHAR(PT.STRAINDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD ') || SUBSTR(PT.PNAME,-5),'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI') STRAINDATE2_DT*/ ,CAST(REPLACE(CONVERT(VARCHAR,PT.STRAINDATE,111),'/','-') +' '+DBO.SUBSTR(PT.PNAME,7,11)+':00.000' AS DATETIME) STRAINDATE2_DT ,PT.PNAME /*時間區間*/ ,PT.PHOUR ,CC.OCID ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE FROM PLAN_TRAINDESC PT JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PT.PLANID =PP.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO =PP.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.PLANID =PP.PLANID AND CC.COMIDNO =PP.COMIDNO AND CC.SEQNO=PP.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID =CC.PLANID WHERE PP.ISAPPRPAPER='Y' AND CC.ISSUCCESS='Y' AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' AND IP.TPLANID ='28' AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(GETDATE()-365 AS DATE)
AND 1<>1 /*不取資料*/
AND CC.OCID IN ($OCIDS$)

SELECT CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,format(ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST/CC.TNUM,2),'000000000.00') CLSDEFGOVCOST ,format(ROUND(PP.TOTALCOST/CC.TNUM,2),'000000000.00') CLSTTLCOST FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /*AND CC.TNUM > 0*/ WHERE OCID=#OCID#

SELECT TOP 1 G.SDATE, G.EDATE ,G.PLANYEAR,G.STDATE FROM ( SELECT C.STDATE SDATE ,DATEADD(YEAR,3,C.STDATE)-1 EDATE ,D.PLANYEAR ,C.STDATE FROM dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.OCID=C.OCID AND C.NOTOPEN='N' JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.PLANID=D.PLANID AND C.COMIDNO =D.COMIDNO AND C.SEQNO =D.SEQNO WHERE D.TPLANID IN ('28','54') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# UNION SELECT a.STDATE SDATE ,DATEADD(YEAR,3,a.STDATE)-1 EDATE ,CONVERT(varchar,a.YEARS) COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS PLANYEAR ,a.STDATE FROM dbo.ADP_TRAININGLIST a WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE a.WorkSuppIdent='Y' and a.TPlanID IN ('46','47','69','58') and a.STDate>= convert(date,'2010/04/01') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# UNION SELECT a.STDATE SDATE ,DATEADD(YEAR,3,a.STDATE)-1 EDATE ,CONVERT(varchar,a.YEARS) COLLATE Chinese_Taiwan_Stroke_CS_AS PLANYEAR ,a.STDATE FROM dbo.ADP_TRAININGLIST_OTH a WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE a.WorkSuppIdent='Y' and a.TPlanID IN ('46','47','69','58') and a.STDate>= convert(date,'2010/04/01') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# ) G WHERE 1=1
AND G.STDATE > CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)
ORDER BY G.SDATE

SELECT B.OCID ,C.SUMOFMONEY FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN STUD_SUBSIDYCOST C ON B.SOCID=C.SOCID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON B.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON CC.PLANID=IP.PLANID AND IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1C$) WHERE ISNULL(C.BUDID,' ')!='04' AND (C.APPLIEDSTATUS=1 OR C.APPLIEDSTATUSM='Y') AND C.SUMOFMONEY > 0 AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND CC.STDATE >=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE <=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT B.OCID ,ISNULL(C.SUMOFMONEY, ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST*1.00/ISNULL(CC.TNUM,1),2)) SUMOFMONEY FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON B.OCID=CC.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON CC.PLANID=IP.PLANID LEFT JOIN STUD_SUBSIDYCOST C ON B.SOCID=C.SOCID WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1C$) AND ISNULL(C.BUDID,' ')!='04' /*排除04:再出發計算*/ AND ISNULL(C.APPLIEDSTATUSM,' ') IN (' ','R') /*(含尚未請領補助的)*/ AND B.STUDSTATUS IN (1,5) /*已報名申請補助費 (已報名) , 學員狀態為在訓的*/ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE<=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT CC.OCID,CS.STUDSTATUS FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS ON CS.OCID =CC.OCID JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO SS ON SS.SID=CS.SID WHERE SS.IDNO=#IDNO# /*AND CS.STUDSTATUS IN (2,3) */
AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE<=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT A.OCID1 OCID,A.SIGNUPSTATUS FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 A JOIN STUD_ENTERTEMP2 B ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID=A.OCID1 JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON CC.PLANID=IP.PLANID AND IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1D$) LEFT JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO SS ON SS.IDNO=B.IDNO LEFT JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS ON CS.OCID =CC.OCID AND CS.SID=SS.SID WHERE A.SIGNUPSTATUS IN (2,4,5) /* 0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取 */ /* 2:報名失敗 4:備取 5:未錄取 (1:報名成功 ,3:正取) */ /* AND TRUNC(SYSDATE)-TRUNC(CC.STDATE+15)>0 */ /* AND DATEDIFF(DAY,CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE),CAST((CC.STDATE+15) AS DATE)) > 0 */ AND DATEDIFF(DAY,CAST((CC.STDATE+15) AS DATE),CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) > 0 /* 系統日超過開訓日15天 */ AND CS.SOCID IS NULL /*排除未完成報到*/ AND B.IDNO=#IDNO#
AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE<=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT CC.OCID,SS.SELRESULTID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP A JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE B ON A.SETID=B.SETID JOIN STUD_SELRESULT SS ON SS.SETID=B.SETID AND CONVERT(VARCHAR,SS.ENTERDATE,111)=CONVERT(VARCHAR,B.ENTERDATE,111) AND SS.SERNUM=B.SERNUM JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID =B.OCID1 JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON CC.PLANID=IP.PLANID AND IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1D$) LEFT JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO SS1 ON SS1.IDNO=A.IDNO LEFT JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS ON CS.OCID =CC.OCID AND CS.SID=SS1.SID WHERE ISNULL(SS.ADMISSION,'Y')='N' /*AND TRUNC(CC.STDATE+15)-TRUNC(SYSDATE) >0*/ AND DATEDIFF(DAY,CAST((CC.STDATE+15) AS DATE),CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE)) > 0 /*系統日大於開訓日加15天*/ AND CS.SOCID IS NULL AND A.IDNO=#IDNO#
AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE<=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT CC.OCID ,FORMAT(ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST*1.00/ISNULL(CC.TNUM,1),2),'000000000.00') DEFGOVCOST FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO AND CC.NOTOPEN='N' /*20100722 BY AMU*/ JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON CC.PLANID=IP.PLANID AND IP.TPLANID IN ($TPLANID28_1D$) /*所有報名資訊*/ WHERE CC.OCID IN ( SELECT A.OCID1 FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 A JOIN STUD_ENTERTEMP2 B ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC ON CC.OCID=A.OCID1 WHERE A.ENTERDATE>=CAST(GETDATE()-(30*6) AS DATE) /*6個月內的報名資料*/ AND CAST(GETDATE() AS DATE) < CAST((CC.STDATE+15) AS DATE) /*排除開訓15天後資料*/ /*SIGNUPSTATUS 0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取*/ AND A.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5) /*排除 2:報名失敗 5:未錄取 */ AND A.ABANDON IS NULL /*放棄報到*/ AND B.IDNO=#IDNO# ) /*排除已申請補助金的資訊*/ AND CC.OCID NOT IN ( SELECT B.OCID FROM STUD_SUBSIDYCOST A JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B ON A.SOCID=B.SOCID JOIN STUD_STUDENTINFO C ON B.SID=C.SID WHERE C.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.SUMOFMONEY > 0 )
AND CC.STDATE>=CAST(#SDATE# AS DATE) AND CC.STDATE<=CAST(#EDATE# AS DATE)

SELECT A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.CYCLTYPE ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.TPERIOD,A.TPROPERTYID ,A.EVTA_NOSHOW EVTANOSHOW ,A.ISSUCCESS ,A.NOTOPEN ,IP.TPLANID /* 28:產投、06:自辦在職、07:企業委託、54:充電起飛 70:區域產業據點 */ ,CASE IP.TPLANID WHEN '28' THEN '1' WHEN '06' THEN '2' WHEN '70' THEN '5' ELSE '' END PLANTYPE ,IP.PLANNAME,IP.DISTNAME,ISNULL(IZ.CTNAME,'其他') CTNAME ,G.TADDRESS ,IZ.ZNAME ZIPNAME ,CASE WHEN A.TADDRESSZIP IS NOT NULL THEN concat('(',A.TADDRESSZIP,')',IZ.ZIPNAME,A.TADDRESS) END TADDRESSZIP /*訓練地點(位置)*/ ,I.ORGNAME ,L.TRC_SN TRCSN ,L.ISSHARE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G ON A.PLANID=G.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=G.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=G.SEQNO JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON A.COMIDNO=I.COMIDNO JOIN VIEW_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ZIPNAME IZ ON IZ.ZIPCODE=A.TADDRESSZIP JOIN E_CLSTRACE L ON A.OCID=L.TRC_OCID WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') /* 28:產投、06:自辦在職、07:企業委託、54:充電起飛 70:區域產業據點 */ AND IP.YEARS>=CONVERT(VARCHAR(4),YEAR(GETDATE())-1) AND L.TRC_MSN=#TRC_MSN# AND (L.ISDELETE !='Y' OR L.ISDELETE IS NULL) /* 排除 Y 為刪除狀態 */ ORDER BY A.FENTERDATE ASC,A.SENTERDATE DESC

SELECT B.IDNO ,F.NAME DISTNAME ,E.ORGNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,CASE WHEN A.TRAINHOURS IS NULL THEN C.THOURS ELSE A.TRAINHOURS END THOURS ,C.STDATE /* 2009/08/25 改成以班級的開結訓日為開結訓日 */ ,C.FTDATE ,A.TRAINHOURS ,A.REJECTTDATE1 ,A.REJECTTDATE2 ,A.STUDSTATUS ,K.PLANNAME ,I.YEARS ,DBO.FN_GET_PLAN_ONCLASS(PP.PLANID,PP.COMIDNO,PP.SEQNO,'WEEKTIME') WEEKS ,A.RTREASONID ,A.RTREASOOTHER ,KR.REASON RTREASONID_TEXT FROM DBO.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS A JOIN DBO.STUD_STUDENTINFO B ON B.SID=A.SID JOIN DBO.STUD_SUBDATA J ON J.SID=A.SID JOIN DBO.CLASS_CLASSINFO C ON A.OCID=C.OCID JOIN DBO.PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON C.PLANID=PP.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=C.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=C.SEQNO JOIN DBO.AUTH_RELSHIP D ON C.RID=D.RID JOIN DBO.ORG_ORGINFO E ON D.ORGID=E.ORGID JOIN DBO.ID_PLAN I ON I.PLANID=C.PLANID JOIN DBO.KEY_PLAN K ON K.TPLANID=I.TPLANID LEFT JOIN DBO.ID_DISTRICT F ON D.DISTID=F.DISTID LEFT JOIN DBO.KEY_TRAINTYPE G ON C.TMID=G.TMID LEFT JOIN DBO.SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=C.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN DBO.STUD_TECHEXAM H ON A.SOCID=H.SOCID LEFT JOIN DBO.KEY_REJECTTREASON KR ON A.RTREASONID=KR.RTREASONID WHERE B.IDNO=#IDNO#

SELECT F.NAME DISTNAME ,E.ORGNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME ,CASE WHEN A.TRAINHOURS IS NULL THEN C.THOURS ELSE A.TRAINHOURS END THOURS ,C.STDATE ,C.FTDATE ,A.TRAINHOURS ,A.REJECTTDATE1 ,A.REJECTTDATE2 ,9 STUDSTATUS /* 不符參訓資格(CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASSDELDATA) */ ,K.PLANNAME ,I.YEARS ,DBO.FN_GET_PLAN_ONCLASS(PP.PLANID,PP.COMIDNO,PP.SEQNO,'WEEKTIME') WEEKS ,A.RTREASONID ,A.RTREASOOTHER ,KR.REASON RTREASONID_TEXT FROM DBO.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASSDELDATA A JOIN DBO.STUD_STUDENTINFO B ON B.SID=A.SID JOIN DBO.STUD_SUBDATA J ON J.SID=A.SID JOIN DBO.SYS_DELLOG DG ON DG.SOCID =A.SOCID AND DG.IDNO=B.IDNO AND DG.DELREASON='4'/*刪除資料有限定 DG.DELREASON='4'*/ JOIN DBO.CLASS_CLASSINFO C ON A.OCID=C.OCID JOIN DBO.PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON C.PLANID=PP.PLANID AND PP.COMIDNO=C.COMIDNO AND PP.SEQNO=C.SEQNO JOIN DBO.AUTH_RELSHIP D ON C.RID=D.RID JOIN DBO.ORG_ORGINFO E ON D.ORGID=E.ORGID JOIN DBO.ID_PLAN I ON I.PLANID=C.PLANID JOIN DBO.KEY_PLAN K ON K.TPLANID=I.TPLANID LEFT JOIN DBO.ID_DISTRICT F ON D.DISTID=F.DISTID LEFT JOIN DBO.KEY_TRAINTYPE G ON C.TMID=G.TMID LEFT JOIN DBO.SHARE_CJOB S ON S.CJOB_UNKEY=C.CJOB_UNKEY LEFT JOIN DBO.STUD_TECHEXAM H ON A.SOCID=H.SOCID LEFT JOIN DBO.KEY_REJECTTREASON KR ON A.RTREASONID=KR.RTREASONID WHERE B.IDNO=#IDNO# ORDER BY I.YEARS,C.STDATE

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY D.PLANYEAR DESC, C.STDATE DESC, B.SOCID ASC) AS SEQ ,A.SID,A.IDNO,A.BIRTHDAY,A.NAME,B.SOCID,C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE,C.YEARS,C.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(c.CLASSCNAME,c.CYCLTYPE)+(CASE WHEN E.BUDID='04' THEN '*' END) CLASSNAME /*預算別為再出發補*號*/ ,D.PLANYEAR,CONVERT(VARCHAR, ISNULL(D.PLANYEAR - 1911, 0)) PLANYEAR_TW,D.PLANID,D.COMIDNO,D.SEQNO ,ISNULL(E.SUMOFMONEY, 0) DEFSTDCOST,E.BUDID /*預算別*/ ,BB.BUDNAME,B.STUDSTATUS,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE,DATEADD(DAY, 1, DATEADD(MONTH, 1, C.FTDATE)) WRDATE1,DATEADD(MONTH, 4, C.FTDATE) WRDATE2 /*可填寫未填寫時 CANWRITE=1*/ ,CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()), DATEADD(DAY, 1, DATEADD(MONTH, 3, C.FTDATE)))>=0 AND DATEDIFF(DAY, DATEADD(MONTH, 4, C.FTDATE), CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()))>=0 AND QQ.SOCID IS NULL AND IP.TPLANID='28' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END CANWRITE ,CONVERT(DATETIME, CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()), 112) ATODAY ,IP.PLANNAME,IP.TPLANID FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.OCID=C.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.PLANID=D.PLANID AND C.COMIDNO=D.COMIDNO AND C.SEQNO=D.SEQNO AND D.APPLIEDRESULT='Y' JOIN VIEW_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=C.PLANID LEFT JOIN STUD_QUESTIONFIN QQ WITH(NOLOCK) ON QQ.SOCID=B.SOCID /* 學員經費 已撥款狀態 E.APPLIEDSTATUS=1 */ LEFT JOIN STUD_SUBSIDYCOST E WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.SOCID=E.SOCID AND E.APPLIEDSTATUS=1 LEFT JOIN VIEW_BUDGET BB ON BB.BUDID=E.BUDID WHERE C.NOTOPEN='N' AND IP.TPLANID IN ('06','28','54','70') /*是否為在職者補助身份 OR (IP.TPLANID IN ('46','47','58') AND B.WORKSUPPIDENT='Y' AND C.STDATE>='2010/04/01')*/ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=CONVERT(DATE,#BIRTHDAY_STR#) /*ORDER BY D.PLANYEAR DESC, C.STDATE DESC, B.SOCID ASC*/ ORDER BY d.PlanYear ,c.STDate ASC

SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY D.PLANYEAR DESC, C.STDATE DESC, B.SOCID ASC) AS SEQ ,A.SID,A.IDNO,A.BIRTHDAY,A.NAME,B.SOCID,C.CLASSCNAME,C.CYCLTYPE,C.YEARS,C.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(c.CLASSCNAME,c.CYCLTYPE)+(CASE WHEN E.BUDID='04' THEN '*' END) CLASSNAME /*預算別為再出發補*號*/ ,D.PLANYEAR,CONVERT(VARCHAR, ISNULL(D.PLANYEAR - 1911, 0)) PLANYEAR_TW ,D.PLANID,D.COMIDNO,D.SEQNO ,ISNULL(E.SUMOFMONEY, 0) DEFSTDCOST,E.BUDID /*預算別*/ ,BB.BUDNAME,B.STUDSTATUS,C.STDATE,C.FTDATE ,DATEADD(DAY, 1, DATEADD(MONTH, 1, C.FTDATE)) WRDATE1 ,DATEADD(MONTH, 4, C.FTDATE) WRDATE2 /*可填寫未填寫時 CANWRITE=1*/ ,CASE WHEN DATEDIFF(DAY, CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()), DATEADD(DAY, 1, DATEADD(MONTH, 3, C.FTDATE)))>=0 AND DATEDIFF(DAY, DATEADD(MONTH, 4, C.FTDATE), CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()))>=0 AND QQ.SOCID IS NULL AND IP.TPLANID='28' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END CANWRITE ,CONVERT(DATETIME, (CONVERT(VARCHAR, YEAR(GETDATE())) + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, MONTH(GETDATE())), 2) + RIGHT('0' + CONVERT(VARCHAR, DAY(GETDATE())), 2)), 112) ATODAY ,IP.PLANNAME,IP.TPLANID FROM STUD_STUDENTINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SID=B.SID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO C WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.OCID=C.OCID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO D WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.PLANID=D.PLANID AND C.COMIDNO=D.COMIDNO AND C.SEQNO=D.SEQNO AND D.APPLIEDRESULT='Y' JOIN VIEW_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=C.PLANID LEFT JOIN STUD_QUESTIONFIN QQ WITH(NOLOCK) ON QQ.SOCID=B.SOCID /* 學員經費 已撥款狀態 E.APPLIEDSTATUS=1 */ LEFT JOIN STUD_SUBSIDYCOST E WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.SOCID=E.SOCID AND E.APPLIEDSTATUS=1 LEFT JOIN VIEW_BUDGET BB ON BB.BUDID=E.BUDID WHERE C.NOTOPEN='N' AND IP.TPLANID IN ('06','28','54','70') /*是否為在職者補助身份 OR (IP.TPLANID IN ('46', '47', '58') AND B.WORKSUPPIDENT='Y' AND C.STDATE>='2010/04/01')*/ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=CONVERT(DATE,#BIRTHDAY_STR#) /*ORDER BY D.PLANYEAR DESC, C.STDATE DESC, B.SOCID ASC*/ ORDER BY d.PlanYear ,c.STDate ASC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1 ,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME ,pp.DISTANCE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO WITH(NOLOCK) ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP AR WITH(NOLOCK) ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC WITH(NOLOCK) ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV WITH(NOLOCK) ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='28' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND year(CC.STDate)=year(getdate()) /*今年的課程*/ AND CC.FTDate>=convert(date,getdate()) /*排除已結訓課程*/ AND CC.STDate > convert(date,getdate()) /*排除已開訓課程*/ /* AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.FTDate)>=dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.STDate) > dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) */
AND CC.TMID=''
AND CC.TMID in ($TMID$)
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1 ,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME ,pp.DISTANCE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP AR ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='06' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND year(CC.STDate)=year(getdate()) /*今年的課程*/ AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.FTDate)>=dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) /*排除已結訓課程*/ AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.STDate)>dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) /*排除已開訓課程*/
AND CC.TMID=''
AND CC.TMID in ($TMID$)
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,SIC.CTNAME CTNAME1 ,TIC.CTNAME CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME ,pp.DISTANCE FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP AR ON AR.RID=CC.RID LEFT JOIN VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID LEFT JOIN VIEW_ONCLASS2 OC ON OC.OCID =CC.OCID /* LEFT JOIN MVIEW_TRAINDESC PP2 ON PP2.OCID =CC.OCID */ LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 ON PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 ON PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP SIZ ON SIZ.ZIPCODE=SP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY SIC ON SIC.CTID=SIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN ID_ZIP TIZ ON TIZ.ZIPCODE=TP1.ZIPCODE LEFT JOIN ID_CITY TIC ON TIC.CTID=TIZ.CTID LEFT JOIN PLAN_VERREPORT PV ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO /* LEFT JOIN PLAN_TRAINDESC PT ON PT.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PT.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PT.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO */ WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND IP.TPLANID='70' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND year(CC.STDate)=year(getdate()) /*今年的課程*/ AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.FTDate)>=dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) /*排除已結訓課程*/ AND dbo.trunc_datetime(CC.STDate) > dbo.trunc_datetime(getdate()) /*排除已開訓課程*/
AND CC.TMID=''
AND CC.TMID in ($TMID$)
AND (SIZ.CTID=#CTID# OR TIZ.CTID=#CTID#)
AND (SIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE# OR TIZ.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#)
) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT CC.OCID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID AND B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /* 排除 使用者不顯示 資料 */ JOIN E_MEMBER C WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.IDNO=C.MEM_IDNO AND A.BIRTHDAY=C.MEM_BIRTH AND C.STOPMEM IS NULL /* 排除停用帳號 */ JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT ID2 ON ID2.DISTID=IP.DISTID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ('06','70','28') /* 06:在職 70:區域產業據點 28:產投 AND B.ENTERPATH='E' X 使用E 網通路 */ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /* 目前登入者-生日 */

SELECT CC.OCID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2DELDATA B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID AND B.MODIFYACCT=A.IDNO JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 AND CC.STDATE > GETDATE()-700 /*顯示2年內的資料*/ JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT ID2 ON ID2.DISTID=IP.DISTID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN E_MEMBER C ON A.IDNO=C.MEM_IDNO AND A.BIRTHDAY=C.MEM_BIRTH AND C.STOPMEM IS NULL /* 排除停用帳號 */ WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ('06','70','28') /* 06:在職 70:區域產業據點 28:產投 */ /* AND B.ENTERPATH='E' X 使用E 網通路 */ AND B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /* 排除 使用者不顯示 資料 */ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /* 目前登入者-生日 */

SELECT CC.OCID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SETID=B.SETID AND B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /* 排除 使用者不顯示 資料 */ JOIN E_MEMBER C WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.IDNO=C.MEM_IDNO AND A.BIRTHDAY=C.MEM_BIRTH AND C.STOPMEM IS NULL /* 排除停用帳號 */ JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN ID_DISTRICT ID2 ON ID2.DISTID=IP.DISTID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO O ON O.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ('06','70','28') /* 06:在職 70:區域產業據點 28:產投 AND B.ENTERPATH='E' X '使用E 網通路 */ AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /* 目前登入者-生日 */
AND CC.OCID NOT IN ($E_OCIDS$)

WITH WE2 AS ( SELECT CC.OCID ,B.SIGNUPSTATUS /*(1,3,4,5) 1.審核通過,3.正取,4.備取,5.未錄取 */ ,IP.TPLANID ,2 ETYPE /* ETYPE 1:現場(非網路) 2:網路 */ ,1 ENTERCHANNEL /* 1.網;2.現;3.通;4.推 */ ,A.ESETID,B.ESERNUM,A.IDNO,A.NAME,B.SIGNUPMEMO,B.RELENTERDATE,B.SIGNNO,SE.EXAMNO ,b.ABANDON,b.ABANDONReason,b.ABANDONACCT,b.ABANDONDATE FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE SE WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.SETID=SE.SETID AND B.ENTERDATE=SE.ENTERDATE AND B.SERNUM=SE.SERNUM WHERE B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /*篩選 使用者要的顯示 資料*/ /*0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取*/ /*AND B.SIGNUPSTATUS='0'*/ /*已收件完成!!*/ /*AND CC.STDATE > dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE())*/ /*未開訓*/ AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)>=YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE())) AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)<=YEAR(GETDATE()) /*2019-02-22 改成只查近兩年的報名資料*/ AND IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /*目前登入者*/ ) ,WE1 AS ( SELECT CC.OCID /*(1,3,4,5) 1.報名成功 ,3.正取,4.備取,5.不錄取(未錄取) */ ,CASE WHEN d.SELRESULTID is null then 1 when d.SELRESULTID='01' then 3 when d.SELRESULTID='02' then 4 when d.SELRESULTID='03' then 5 end SIGNUPSTATUS ,IP.TPLANID,1 ETYPE /* ETYPE 1:現場(非網路) 2:網路 */ ,B.ENTERCHANNEL /* 1.網;2.現;3.通;4.推 */ ,A.ESETID,B.ESERNUM,A.IDNO,A.NAME ,'' SIGNUPMEMO ,B.RELENTERDATE,0 SIGNNO,B.EXAMNO,d.ABANDON,d.ABANDONReason,d.ABANDONACCT,d.ABANDONDATE FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.SETID=B.SETID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_SELRESULT D WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.SETID=D.SETID AND B.ENTERDATE=D.ENTERDATE AND B.SERNUM=D.SERNUM AND B.OCID1=d.OCID WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 'X' FROM WE2 X2 WHERE X2.OCID=CC.OCID AND X2.SIGNUPSTATUS IN (1,3,4,5)) /* 排除E網OK的資訊，使用E網資訊，不使用現場報名資訊 */ /*0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取*/ /*AND B.SIGNUPSTATUS='0'*/ /*已收件完成!!*/ AND B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /*篩選 使用者要的顯示 資料*/ /*AND CC.STDATE > dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE())*/ /*未開訓*/ AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)>=YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE())) AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)<=YEAR(GETDATE()) /*2019-02-22 改成只查近兩年的報名資料*/ AND IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /*目前登入者*/ ) /* 資料別 （1 產投, 2 在職（e網報名）, 3在職（現場報名）） */ /* ETYPE 1:現場(非網路) 2:網路 */ /* PTYPE 網路_產投(1) 網路(e網報名)_非產投(2) 現場_現場(3) */ SELECT CASE WHEN A.ETYPE=1 then '3' /* 現場_現場(3) */ WHEN A.ETYPE=2 AND A.TPLANID!='28' then '2' /* 網路(e網報名)_非產投(2) */ ELSE '1' end PTYPE /* 網路_產投(1) */ ,A.ENTERCHANNEL /* 1.網;2.現;3.通;4.推 */ ,A.ESETID,A.ESERNUM,A.IDNO,A.NAME,IP.YEARS PLANYEAR,IP.PLANNAME,IP.TPLANID,ISNULL(CC.NOTOPEN,'N') NOTOPENM,ISNULL(A.EXAMNO,'') EXAMNO ,A.SIGNUPSTATUS ,CASE WHEN IP.TPLANID NOT IN ('28') AND A.SIGNUPMEMO IS NOT NULL THEN '請逕洽勞動部'+VD.DISTNAME+'承辦人'+VD.CONTACTNAME+'，電話：'+VD.PHONE+'。' ELSE A.SIGNUPMEMO END SIGNUPMEMO ,A.RELENTERDATE,A.SIGNNO,CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE,CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.ETRAIN_SHOW,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,CASE WHEN CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) AND ISNULL(CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE)<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END XDAY1 /* 開訓後14天 */ ,CASE WHEN (CC.STDATE+14)<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END XDAY14 ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ /* SIGNUPSTATUS 0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取 1.送件成功且未超過報名截止時間皆可取消報名 2.報名截止日前，若為「備取學員」可自行從在職訓練網取消報名 */ ,CASE WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() AND A.ESETID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=4 AND ip.TPLANID='28' AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() AND A.ESETID IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CANCANCEL ,CASE WHEN CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() THEN '報名已截止, 如欲取消報名, 請洽訓練單位!' WHEN CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND A.SIGNUPSTATUS!=0 THEN '單位已審核, 如欲取消報名, 請洽訓練單位!' END NOCANCELMSG /* 取消報名說明 */ ,GETDATE() ATODAY /* 系統時間 */ ,CASE WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() THEN '-報名已結束' WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND GETDATE() < CC.SENTERDATE THEN '-報名未開始' WHEN CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE THEN '-已開訓' WHEN CC.FTDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN '-已結訓' END CLASSDATEMSG /* 班級狀況說明 */ /* ,dbo.FN_GET_STUDMSG(cc.OCID,A.IDNO) STUDTRAINMSG 學員狀況說明 */ ,dbo.FN_GET_STUDSTATUS(cc.OCID,A.IDNO) STUDSTATUS /* 學員狀況 */ ,a.ABANDON,a.ABANDONReason,a.ABANDONACCT,a.ABANDONDATE FROM (SELECT * FROM WE2 UNION SELECT * FROM WE1) A JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=A.OCID JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO O WITH(NOLOCK) ON O.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO LEFT JOIN dbo.V_DISTRICT VD ON VD.DISTID=IP.DISTID WHERE 1=1
AND ( (CC.OCID IN ($TIMS_OCIDS$)) OR (CC.OCID IN ($E_OCIDS$)) )
AND (CC.OCID IN ($E_OCIDS$))
/* ORDER BY DATA.PTYPE, DATA.FENTERDATE */ ORDER BY A.RELENTERDATE DESC

WITH WE2 AS ( SELECT CC.OCID ,B.SIGNUPSTATUS /* (1,3,4,5) 1.審核通過,3.正取,4.備取,5.未錄取 */ ,IP.TPLANID ,2 ETYPE /* ETYPE 1:現場(非網路) 2:網路 */ ,1 ENTERCHANNEL /* 1.網;2.現;3.通;4.推 */ ,A.ESETID,B.ESERNUM,A.IDNO,A.NAME,B.SIGNUPMEMO,B.RELENTERDATE,B.SIGNNO ,B.MODIFYDATE DELENTERDATE FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE2DELDATA B WITH(NOLOCK) ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID AND B.MODIFYACCT=A.IDNO JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=B.OCID1 AND CC.STDATE > GETDATE()-700 /*顯示2年內的資料*/ JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID WHERE B.USERNOSHOW IS NULL /*篩選 使用者要的顯示 資料*/ /*0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:報名失敗 3:正取(KEY_SELRESULT) 4:備取 5:未錄取*/ /*AND B.SIGNUPSTATUS='0'*/ /*已收件完成!!*/ /*AND CC.STDATE > dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE())*/ /*未開訓*/ AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)>=YEAR(DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE())) AND YEAR(B.ENTERDATE)<=YEAR(GETDATE()) /*2019-02-22 改成只查近兩年的報名資料*/ AND IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# /*目前登入者*/ AND A.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# /*目前登入者*/ ) /* 資料別 （1 產投, 2 在職（e網報名）, 3在職（現場報名）） */ /* ETYPE 1:現場(非網路) 2:網路 */ /* PTYPE 網路_產投(1) 網路(e網報名)_非產投(2) 現場_現場(3) */ SELECT CASE WHEN A.ETYPE=1 then '3' /* 現場_現場(3) */ WHEN A.ETYPE=2 AND A.TPLANID!='28' then '2' /* 網路(e網報名)_非產投(2) */ ELSE '1' end PTYPE /* 網路_產投(1) */ ,A.ENTERCHANNEL /* 1.網;2.現;3.通;4.推 */ ,A.ESETID,A.ESERNUM,A.IDNO,A.NAME,IP.YEARS PLANYEAR,IP.PLANNAME,IP.TPLANID,ISNULL(CC.NOTOPEN,'N') NOTOPENM,A.SIGNUPSTATUS ,CASE WHEN IP.TPLANID NOT IN ('28') AND A.SIGNUPMEMO IS NOT NULL THEN '請逕洽勞動部'+VD.DISTNAME+'承辦人'+VD.CONTACTNAME+'，電話：'+VD.PHONE+'。' ELSE A.SIGNUPMEMO END SIGNUPMEMO ,A.RELENTERDATE,A.SIGNNO,A.DELENTERDATE ,concat(YEAR(A.DELENTERDATE)-1911,format(A.DELENTERDATE,'/MM/dd HH:mm'),' 自行取消報名') SELFCANCELMSG ,CC.OCID,CC.CLASSCNAME ,CC.CYCLTYPE ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE,CC.ETRAIN_SHOW,CC.SENTERDATE,CC.FENTERDATE ,CASE WHEN CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) AND ISNULL(CC.FENTERDATE,CC.STDATE)<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END XDAY1 /* 開訓後14天 */ ,CASE WHEN (CC.STDATE+14)<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END XDAY14 ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ /* 送件成功且未超過報名截止時間皆可取消報名 */ ,CASE WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END CANCANCEL ,CASE WHEN CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() THEN '報名已截止, 如欲取消報名, 請洽訓練單位!' WHEN CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND A.SIGNUPSTATUS!=0 THEN '單位已審核, 如欲取消報名, 請洽訓練單位!' END NOCANCELMSG /* 取消報名說明 */ ,GETDATE() ATODAY /* 系統時間 */ ,CASE WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND CC.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() THEN '-報名已結束' WHEN A.SIGNUPSTATUS=0 AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE AND GETDATE() < CC.SENTERDATE THEN '-報名未開始' WHEN CC.STDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) AND CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())<=CC.FTDATE THEN '-已開訓' WHEN CC.FTDATE<=CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE()) THEN '-已結訓' END CLASSDATEMSG /* 班級狀況說明 */ ,dbo.FN_GET_STUDSTATUS(cc.OCID,A.IDNO) STUDSTATUS /* 學員狀況 */ FROM WE2 A JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) ON CC.OCID=A.OCID JOIN dbo.VIEW_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO O WITH(NOLOCK) ON O.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO LEFT JOIN dbo.V_DISTRICT VD ON VD.DISTID=IP.DISTID WHERE 1=1
AND (CC.OCID IN ($E_OCIDS$))
ORDER BY A.RELENTERDATE DESC
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ESERNUM),0)+1 NEWESERNUM FROM STUD_DELENTERTYPE2 WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE LEN(ESERNUM)<8

SELECT B.OCID1,B.SIGNUPSTATUS ,CASE WHEN C.FENTERDATE < GETDATE() THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END ISOVERENTERDATE FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID JOIN CLASS_CLASSINFO C ON B.OCID1=C.OCID WHERE b.ESETID=#ESETID# and b.ESERNUM=#ESERNUM# and b.OCID1=#OCID1#
SELECT CODE, DESCR FROM CODE1 WHERE ITEM='QATYPE' AND HIST='Y' /*啟用中*/ ORDER BY FREQ

SELECT A.QAID, A.ANSWER, A.QUESTION, B.DESCR AS TYPEID_TEXT FROM TB_QA A LEFT JOIN CODE1 B ON A.TYPEID COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS=B.CODE COLLATE CHINESE_TAIWAN_STROKE_CI_AS WHERE A.ISUSED='Y' AND B.ITEM='QATYPE' AND GETDATE()>=A.START_DATE AND (A.END_DATE IS NULL OR GETDATE()<=A.END_DATE)
AND A.TYPEID=#TYPEID#
AND ( 1<>1
OR (A.QUESTION LIKE '%'+#WHERE[]#+'%' OR A.ANSWER LIKE '%'+#WHERE[]#+'%')
)
ORDER BY A.TYPEID, A.C_SORT1, START_DATE DESC
SELECT dbo.FN_GET_ModifyDate('SINFO',#IDNO#) AS S1DATE
SELECT dbo.FN_GET_ModifyDate('STEMP2',#IDNO#) AS S3DATE

SELECT TOP 1 ST.MARITALSTATUS ,ST.PASSPORTNO,ST.SEX,ST.BIRTHDAY,ST.DEGREEID,ST.GRADID,ST.SCHOOL SCHOOLNAME,ST.DEPARTMENT ,ST.PHONE1 PHONED,ST.PHONE2 PHONEN ,ST.CELLPHONE ,convert(varchar,ST.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,ST.ZIPCODE6W ZIPCODE_6W ,ST.ADDRESS,ST.EMAIL ,convert(varchar,ET2.ZIPCODE2) ZIPCODE2 ,ET2.ZIPCODE2_6W ,ET2.HOUSEHOLDADDRESS,ET2.ACCTMODE,ST.ISAGREE,ST.MILITARYID,ET2.UNAME,ET2.INTAXNO,ET2.SERVDEPT,ET2.ACTNAME,ET2.ACTNO ,ET2.JOBTITLE ,ET2.ZIPCODE3 ,ET2.ZIPCODE3_6W ,ET2.ACTADDRESS,ET2.ACTTEL ,ET2.Q1,CAST(ET2.Q2_1 AS VARCHAR) Q2_1,CAST(ET2.Q2_2 AS VARCHAR) Q2_2 ,CAST(ET2.Q2_3 AS VARCHAR) Q2_3,CAST(ET2.Q2_4 AS VARCHAR) Q2_4,ET2.Q3,ET2.Q3_OTHER,ET2.Q4,ET2.Q5 ,CAST(ET2.Q61 AS VARCHAR) Q61,CAST(ET2.Q62 AS VARCHAR) Q62,CAST(ET2.Q63 AS VARCHAR) Q63 ,CAST(ET2.Q64 AS VARCHAR) Q64 /*,to_char(st.ModifyDate,'yyyy/MM/dd') ModifyDate,to_char(et.ModifyDate,'yyyy/MM/dd') ModifyDate2*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),ST.MODIFYDATE,111) MODIFYDATE ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),ET.MODIFYDATE,111) MODIFYDATE2 FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 ST JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 ET ON ST.ESETID=ET.ESETID JOIN STUD_ENTERTRAIN2 ET2 ON ET.ESERNUM=ET2.ESERNUM WHERE ST.IDNO=#IDNO# AND ST.BIRTHDAY=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(#BIRTHDAY#) ORDER BY ST.MODIFYDATE DESC ,ET.MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT TOP 1 SS.MARITALSTATUS ,SS.PASSPORTNO,SS.SEX,SS.DEGREEID,SS.GRADUATESTATUS GRADID ,SD.SCHOOL SCHOOLNAME,SD.DEPARTMENT,SD.PHONED ,SD.PHONEN,SD.CELLPHONE ,convert(varchar,SD.ZIPCODE1) ZIPCODE ,SD.ZIPCODE1_6W ZIPCODE_6W ,SD.ADDRESS,SD.EMAIL ,convert(varchar,SD.ZIPCODE2) ZIPCODE2 ,SD.ZIPCODE2_6W ZIPCODE2_6W ,SD.HOUSEHOLDADDRESS,SSP.ACCTMODE,SS.ISAGREE,SS.MILITARYID ,SSP.UNAME,SSP.INTAXNO,SSP.SERVDEPT,SSP.ACTNAME,SSP.ACTNO,SSP.JOBTITLE ,SSP.ACTZIPCODE ZIPCODE3 ,SSP.ACTZIPCODE_6W ZIPCODE3_6W ,SSP.ACTADDRESS,SSP.ACTTEL,CS2.Q1 ,CASE WHEN CS22.Q21 IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '2' END Q2_1,CASE WHEN CS22.Q22 IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '2' END Q2_2 ,CASE WHEN CS22.Q23 IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '2' END Q2_3,CASE WHEN CS22.Q24 IS NOT NULL THEN '1' ELSE '2' END Q2_4 ,CS2.Q3,CS2.Q3_OTHER,CS2.Q4,CS2.Q5,CS2.Q61,CS2.Q62,CS2.Q63,CS2.Q64 /*,TO_CHAR(SS.MODIFYDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') MODIFYDATE,TO_CHAR(CSC.MODIFYDATE,'YYYY/MM/DD') MODIFYDATE2*/ ,CONVERT(varchar(10),SS.MODIFYDATE,111) MODIFYDATE ,convert(varchar(10),CSC.MODIFYDATE,111) MODIFYDATE2 FROM dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO SS JOIN dbo.STUD_SUBDATA SD ON SS.SID=SD.SID JOIN dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CSC ON SS.SID=CSC.SID LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_SERVICEPLACE SSP ON CSC.SOCID=SSP.SOCID LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_TRAINBG CS2 ON CS2.SOCID=CSC.SOCID LEFT JOIN dbo.V_TRAINBGQ2 CS22 ON CS22.SOCID=CSC.SOCID WHERE SS.IDNO=#IDNO# AND SS.BIRTHDAY=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(#BIRTHDAY#) ORDER BY SS.MODIFYDATE DESC ,CSC.MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT A.ESETID3,A.IDNO,A.NAME /*,TO_CHAR(a.BIRTHDAY,'yyyy/MM/dd') BIRTHDAY*/ ,A.BIRTHDAY ,A.MIDENTITYID,CAST(A.PRIORWORKPAY as varchar) PRIORWORKPAY ,A.POSTNO,A.ACCTNO,A.ACCTHEADNO,A.BANKNAME,A.ACCTEXNO,A.EXBANKNAME ,A.MARITALSTATUS,A.PASSPORTNO,A.SEX,A.DEGREEID,A.GRADID,A.SCHOOL SCHOOLNAME,A.DEPARTMENT,A.PHONE1 PHONED,A.PHONE2 PHONEN ,A.CELLPHONE ,convert(varchar,A.ZIPCODE1) ZIPCODE ,A.ZIPCODE1_6W ZIPCODE_6W ,A.ADDRESS,A.EMAIL ,convert(varchar,A.ZIPCODE2) ZIPCODE2,A.ZIPCODE2_6W ZIPCODE2_6W ,A.HOUSEHOLDADDRESS,A.ACCTMODE,A.ISAGREE,A.MILITARYID ,A.UNAME,A.INTAXNO,A.SERVDEPT,A.ACTNAME,A.ACTTYPE,A.ACTNO,A.JOBTITLE ,convert(varchar,A.ZIPCODE3) ZIPCODE3,A.ZIPCODE3_6W ZIPCODE3_6W ,A.ACTADDRESS,A.ACTTEL ,A.Q1,CAST(A.Q2_1 AS VARCHAR) Q2_1,CAST(A.Q2_2 AS VARCHAR) Q2_2,CAST(A.Q2_3 AS VARCHAR) Q2_3,CAST(A.Q2_4 AS VARCHAR) Q2_4,A.Q3,A.Q3_OTHER,A.Q4,A.Q5,CAST(A.Q61 AS VARCHAR) Q61 ,CAST(A.Q62 AS VARCHAR) Q62,CAST(A.Q63 AS VARCHAR) Q63,CAST(A.Q64 AS VARCHAR) Q64 ,A.ISEMAIL,A.MODIFYACCT /*,TO_CHAR(a.MODIFYDATE,'yyyy/MM/dd') MODIFYDATE*/ ,CONVERT(VARCHAR(10),A.MODIFYDATE,111) MODIFYDATE ,A.SERVDEPTID,A.JOBTITLEID,A.ISPLAN28 FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP3 A WHERE A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND A.BIRTHDAY=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(#BIRTHDAY#) ORDER BY A.MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT NAME ,ACID IDNO ,CASE ISFOREIGN WHEN 0 THEN 1 WHEN 1 THEN 2 END PASSPORTNO ,CASE SEX WHEN '1' THEN 'M' WHEN '2' THEN 'F' ELSE SEX END SEX ,CONVERT(DATETIME,BIRTHDAY,111) BIRTHDAY ,EDU DEGREEID ,dbo.LPAD(GRADU,2,'0') GRADID ,MARRI MARITALSTATUS ,TEL1 PHONED ,TEL2 PHONEN ,MOBILE CELLPHONE ,convert(varchar,ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,null ZIPCODE_6W ,ADDR ADDRESS ,EMAIL ,'1' ISEMAIL ,SCHOOLNAME ,DEPTNAME DEPARTMENT FROM dbo.MEMBER WHERE RID=#RID# AND ACID=#ACID#

SELECT a.IDNO,a.SBCOMMENT ,dbo.FN_CDATE(a.SBSDATE) SBODATE ,dbo.FN_CDATE(DATEADD(YY,a.SBYEARS,a.SBSDATE)) SBEDATE FROM dbo.STUD_BLACKLIST a WHERE a.AVAIL='Y' /*AND (sysdate>=a.SBSDATE AND SYSDATE<=ADD_MONTHS(a.SBSDATE,+a.SBYEARS*12) )*/ AND (getdate()>=a.SBSDATE AND getdate()<=DATEADD(YY,a.SBYEARS,a.SBSDATE) ) AND a.IDNO=#IDNO# ORDER BY a.SBSDATE

SELECT a.IDNO,a.SBCOMMENT,dbo.FN_CDATE(a.SBSDATE) SBODATE,dbo.FN_CDATE(DATEADD(YY,a.SBYEARS,a.SBSDATE)) SBEDATE FROM dbo.STUD_BLACKLIST a WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE a.AVAIL='Y' /*AND (sysdate>=a.SBSDATE AND SYSDATE<=ADD_MONTHS(a.SBSDATE,+a.SBYEARS*12) )*/ AND (getdate()>=a.SBSDATE AND getdate()<=DATEADD(YY,a.SBYEARS,a.SBSDATE) ) AND a.IDNO=#IDNO# AND a.TPLANID=#TPLANID# ORDER BY a.SBSDATE

SELECT A.OCID,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(a.CLASSCNAME,a.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(a.CLASSCNAME,a.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.LEVELTYPE,A.RID,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE,A.TNUM,A.ADMISSIONS ,IP.TPLANID,IP.YEARS,A.CLSID FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE B ON B.TMID=A.TMID JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP D ON D.RID=A.RID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO C ON C.ORGID=D.ORGID JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID WHERE A.NotOpen='N' AND IP.TPLANID=#TPLANID# AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT CC.OCID, CC.CLSID, CC.PLANID, CC.YEARS, CC.STDATE,CC.FTDATE,CC.TMID ,CC.RID, CC.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,CC.TPROPERTYID, CC.SENTERDATE, CC.FENTERDATE, CC.CHECKINDATE ,case when cc.tnum is null or cc.tnum=0 then '0' else CAST(CAST(ROUND(PP.DEFGOVCOST/CC.TNUM,2) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS VARCHAR) end CLSDEFGOVCOST ,case when cc.tnum is null or cc.tnum=0 then '0' else CAST(CAST(ROUND(PP.TOTALCOST/CC.TNUM,2) AS NUMERIC(10,2)) AS VARCHAR) end CLSTTLCOST FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO PP WITH(NOLOCK) ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO WHERE CC.OCID=#OCID#
SELECT COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND convert(date,ENTERDATE)= convert(date,GETDATE())
SELECT COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2DELDATA WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND convert(date,ENTERDATE)=convert(date,GETDATE())
SELECT COUNT(1) TOTAL FROM STUD_DELENTERTYPE2 WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND convert(date,ENTERDATE)= convert(date,GETDATE())
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(SERNUM),0)+1 MAXSERNUM FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND convert(date,ENTERDATE)= convert(date,GETDATE())
SELECT ESERNUM ,ESETID,SETID,ENTERDATE ,SERNUM,RELENTERDATE,OCID1,TMID1,RID,PLANID,IDENTITYID,ENTERPATH,SIGNNO FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND OCID1=#OCID1#

SELECT B.TMID,B.TRAINID,B.TRAINNAME,A.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE,A.LEVELTYPE,A.RID ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,C.ORGNAME ,A.SENTERDATE ,A.FENTERDATE ,A.TNUM ,IP.YEARS FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN KEY_TRAINTYPE B ON B.TMID=A.TMID JOIN AUTH_RELSHIP D ON D.RID=A.RID JOIN ORG_ORGINFO C ON C.ORGID=D.ORGID JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID WHERE IP.TPLANID='28' /*只查產投報名*/ AND A.NOTOPEN='N' AND A.OCID=#OCID#
SELECT B.SIGNNO FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID WHERE B.SIGNNO > 0 AND A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND B.OCID1=#OCID1#
SELECT B.SIGNNO FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B JOIN STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID WHERE A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND B.OCID1=#OCID1#
SELECT 1 FROM dbo.V_ENTERTYPE2 WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE TPLANID=#TPLANID# AND STDATE > DBO.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) AND SIGNUPSTATUS IN (0,1,3) AND IDNO=#IDNO#
SELECT b.ESETID,b.OCID1,COUNT(1) cnt FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 b JOIN STUD_ENTERTEMP2 a ON a.ESETID=b.ESETID WHERE a.IDNO=#IDNO# AND b.OCID1=#OCID1# GROUP BY b.ESETID,b.OCID1 HAVING COUNT(1) > 1
SELECT 'X' FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE SIGNNO IS NULL AND ESETID=#ESETID# AND OCID1=#OCID1#

SELECT MIN(B.ESERNUM) ESERNUM /*找出 6小時內 第1筆序號*/ FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B JOIN STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID WHERE A.IDNO=#IDNO# AND B.OCID1=#OCID1# AND B.SIGNNO=#SIGNNO# AND B.MODIFYDATE>=DATEADD(HOUR,-6,getdate())/*找出 6小時內 第1筆序號*/
SELECT MAX(SEID) SEID /*找出最大重複資料序號*/ FROM STUD_ENTERTRAIN2 WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE ESERNUM=#ESERNUM# GROUP BY ESERNUM HAVING COUNT(1)>1

SELECT CC.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE2 a WITH(NOLOCK) /*報名班級*/ JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP2 b WITH(NOLOCK) on b.ESETID=a.ESETID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO cc WITH(NOLOCK) on cc.OCID=a.OCID1 JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN ip WITH(NOLOCK) on ip.PLANID =cc.PLANID WHERE ip.TPLANID ='28' AND cc.STDATE>=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) /* signUpStatus 0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:未錄取 3:正取 4:備取 5:未錄取 排除報名失敗與未錄取 (a.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5)) by AMU 20090915 */ AND a.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5) AND a.ABANDON IS NULL /*放棄報到*/ AND b.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cc.OCID != #OCID#

SELECT CC.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM dbo.STUD_ENTERTYPE2 a WITH(NOLOCK) /*報名班級*/ JOIN dbo.STUD_ENTERTEMP2 b WITH(NOLOCK) on b.ESETID=a.ESETID JOIN dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO cc WITH(NOLOCK) on cc.OCID=a.OCID1 JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN ip WITH(NOLOCK) on ip.PLANID =cc.PLANID LEFT JOIN dbo.V_STUDENTINFO ss WITH(NOLOCK) on ss.IDNO=B.IDNO AND ss.OCID=a.OCID1 WHERE ip.TPLANID ='28' AND dateadd(d,14,cc.STDATE)>=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) /* signUpStatus 0:收件完成 1:報名成功 2:未錄取 3:正取 4:備取 5:未錄取 排除報名失敗與未錄取 (a.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5)) by AMU 20190826 */ AND a.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5) AND a.ABANDON IS NULL /*放棄報到*/ AND ISNULL(ss.STUDSTATUS,1) NOT IN (2,3) AND b.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cc.OCID != #OCID#

SELECT CC.OCID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID =CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.CLASS_STUDENTSOFCLASS CS WITH(NOLOCK) ON CS.OCID =CC.OCID JOIN dbo.STUD_STUDENTINFO SS WITH(NOLOCK) ON SS.SID=CS.SID WHERE IP.TPLANID ='28' AND CC.FTDATE>=dbo.TRUNC_DATETIME(GETDATE()) AND CS.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3) AND SS.IDNO=#IDNO# AND CC.OCID !=#OCID#

SELECT B.TMID,B.TRAINID,B.TRAINNAME,A.OCID ,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,A.CYCLTYPE,A.LEVELTYPE,A.RID,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE,C.ORGNAME ,A.SENTERDATE ,A.FENTERDATE ,A.TNUM ,A.ADMISSIONS ,IP.YEARS,A.CLSID FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO A WITH(NOLOCK) JOIN dbo.KEY_TRAINTYPE B WITH(NOLOCK) ON B.TMID=A.TMID JOIN dbo.AUTH_RELSHIP D WITH(NOLOCK) ON D.RID=A.RID JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO C WITH(NOLOCK) ON C.ORGID=D.ORGID JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP WITH(NOLOCK) ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID WHERE IP.TPLANID='28' /*限定產投計畫。*/ AND A.NOTOPEN='N' /*限定開班*/ AND A.OCID=#OCID#
SELECT 'X' FROM dbo.CLASS_DESCDOUBLE WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE OCID1=#OCID1# AND OCID2=#OCID2#
declare @selectvalue int exec @selectvalue=dbo.Do_InsertT2SignNo @v_IDNO='$v_IDNO$',@v_OCID1=$v_OCID1$ select @selectvalue as SIGNNO

SELECT a.MEM_SN /*PK*/ ,a.MEM_IDNO ,a.MEM_PWD ,a.MEM_NAME ,a.MEM_FOREIGN ,a.MEM_EDU ,a.MEM_BIRTH ,a.MEM_SEX ,a.MEM_MILITARY ,a.MEM_MARRY ,a.MEM_GRADUATE ,a.MEM_SCHOOL ,a.MEM_DEPART ,a.MEM_ZIP ,a.MEM_ADDR ,a.MEM_TEL ,a.MEM_TELN ,a.MEM_MOBILE ,a.MEM_EMAIL ,a.MEM_OPENSEC ,a.MEM_MEMO ,a.MEM_TIMS ,a.EPAPER ,a.ELOGIN ,a.MEM_USR_ID ,a.MEM_REGTIME ,a.MEM_OPUSER ,a.MEM_UDATE ,a.HANDTYPEID ,a.HANDLEVELID /*,a.MEM_ZIP2W*/ ,a.STOPMEM ,a.MEM_LOGINCNT ,a.HANDTYPEID2 ,a.HANDLEVELID2 ,a.MFLAG ,a.MEM_ZIP6W ,SS.SBIRTHDAY FROM dbo.E_MEMBER a LEFT JOIN dbo.VIEW_STUDENTINFO1 SS ON SS.IDNO=A.MEM_IDNO AND SS.SBIRTHDAY=A.MEM_BIRTH WHERE ISNULL(a.STOPMEM,'N') ='N' /*排除停用帳號*/ AND UPPER(a.MEM_IDNO)=#MEM_IDNO# AND a.MEM_BIRTH=#MEM_BIRTH#

SELECT A.OCID ,A.TMID ,A.TPROPERTYID ,A.RID ,A.STDATE,A.FTDATE ,A.SENTERDATE,A.FENTERDATE ,A.PLANID,A.NOTOPEN ,G.CAPAGE1,G.CAPAGE2 ,G.CAPDEGREE ,H.NAME CAPDEGREE_TEXT ,IP.TPLANID FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=A.PLANID JOIN KEY_PLAN C ON C.TPLANID=IP.TPLANID JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO G ON G.PLANID=A.PLANID AND G.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO AND G.SEQNO=A.SEQNO LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE H ON G.CAPDEGREE=H.DEGREEID /* 06:在職 70:區域產業據點 */ WHERE IP.TPLANID IN ('28','06','70') AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT I.ORGID, I.ORGNAME ,A.PLANID, A.COMIDNO, A.SEQNO, A.RID, A.OCID ,A.EXAMDATE, A.EXAMPERIOD,A.TPROPERTYID ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO WHERE a.OCID in ($OCID$)
SELECT DISTINCT B.OCID1 FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B ON A.ESETID=B.ESETID WHERE a.IDNO=#IDNO# AND B.SIGNUPSTATUS NOT IN (2,5) /*2:報名失敗,5:未錄取*/

SELECT I.ORGID, I.ORGNAME ,A.PLANID, A.COMIDNO, A.SEQNO, A.RID, A.OCID, A.EXAMDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO WHERE A.NOTOPEN='N' /*要開班的課程*/ AND A.OCID IN ($OCIDS$) AND I.ORGID=#ORGID# AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT DISTINCT B.OCID1 FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP A JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE B ON A.SETID=B.SETID LEFT JOIN STUD_SELRESULT F ON B.SETID=F.SETID AND B.ENTERDATE=F.ENTERDATE AND B.SERNUM=F.SERNUM WHERE A.IDNO=#IDNO# /*F.ADMISSION 是否錄取 (N:不通過, Y:通過, NULL:尚未審核、審核中)*/ AND (F.ADMISSION ='Y' OR F.ADMISSION IS NULL) /*B2.SIGNUPSTATUS 排除 報名狀態 2:報名失敗 5:未錄取 */ AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 'X' FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 A2 JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE2 B2 ON A2.ESETID=B2.ESETID AND B2.SIGNUPSTATUS IN (2,5) WHERE A2.IDNO=#IDNO# AND B2.OCID1=B.OCID1 )

SELECT I.ORGID, I.ORGNAME ,A.PLANID, A.COMIDNO, A.SEQNO, A.RID, A.OCID, A.EXAMDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO /*AND A.NOTOPEN='N'*/ /*要開班的課程*/ WHERE A.OCID IN ($OCIDS$) AND I.ORGID=#ORGID# AND A.OCID=#OCID#

SELECT I.ORGID, I.ORGNAME ,A.PLANID, A.COMIDNO, A.SEQNO, A.RID, A.OCID, A.EXAMDATE ,A.CLASSCNAME ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSNAME /*課程名稱*/ ,dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(A.CLASSCNAME,A.CYCLTYPE) CLASSCNAME2 /*課程名稱*/ ,A.STDATE ,P.CAPDEGREE ,P.CAPAGE1 ,CASE WHEN ISNULL(P.CAPAGE2,0)=0 THEN 999 WHEN ISNULL(P.CAPAGE2,0)<=P.CAPAGE1 THEN P.CAPAGE1 ELSE ISNULL(P.CAPAGE2,0) END CAPAGE2 ,B.NAME CAPDEGREE_TEXT FROM CLASS_CLASSINFO A JOIN ORG_ORGINFO I ON I.COMIDNO=A.COMIDNO JOIN PLAN_PLANINFO P ON A.PLANID=P.PLANID AND A.COMIDNO=P.COMIDNO AND A.SEQNO=P.SEQNO LEFT JOIN KEY_DEGREE B ON P.CAPDEGREE=B.DEGREEID WHERE A.OCID IN ($OCIDS$)

SELECT TOP 1 a.ESETID,a.SETID ,a.IDNO,a.NAME,a.SEX,a.BIRTHDAY,a.PASSPORTNO,a.MARITALSTATUS ,a.DEGREEID,a.GRADID,a.SCHOOL,a.DEPARTMENT,a.MILITARYID ,a.ADDRESS,a.PHONE1,a.PHONE2,a.CELLPHONE ,a.EMAIL,a.ISAGREE ,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE2W) ZIPCODE2W ,a.ZIPCODE_N,a.ZIPCODE6W ,a.LAINFLAG FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 a WHERE a.IDNO=#IDNO# AND a.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# ORDER BY a.MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT TOP 1 a.ESETID,a.SETID ,a.IDNO,a.NAME,a.SEX,a.BIRTHDAY,a.PASSPORTNO,a.MARITALSTATUS ,a.DEGREEID,a.GRADID,a.SCHOOL,a.DEPARTMENT,a.MILITARYID ,a.ADDRESS,a.PHONE1,a.PHONE2,a.CELLPHONE ,a.EMAIL,a.ISAGREE ,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE2W) ZIPCODE2W ,a.ZIPCODE_N,a.ZIPCODE6W ,a.LAINFLAG FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 a WHERE a.IDNO=#IDNO# ORDER BY a.MODIFYDATE DESC

SELECT TOP 1 a.ESETID,a.SETID ,a.IDNO,a.NAME,a.SEX,a.BIRTHDAY,a.PASSPORTNO,a.MARITALSTATUS ,a.DEGREEID,a.GRADID,a.SCHOOL,a.DEPARTMENT,a.MILITARYID ,a.ADDRESS,a.PHONE1,a.PHONE2,a.CELLPHONE ,a.EMAIL,a.ISAGREE ,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE) ZIPCODE ,convert(varchar,a.ZIPCODE2W) ZIPCODE2W ,a.ZIPCODE_N,a.ZIPCODE6W ,a.LAINFLAG FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP2 a WHERE a.IDNO=#IDNO# AND a.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# AND LEN(a.ESETID) < 8 ORDER BY a.MODIFYDATE DESC
SELECT MAX(SETID) SETID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP WHERE IDNO=#IDNO# AND BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY#
SELECT MAX(SETID) SETID FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP WHERE IDNO=#IDNO#

/*,a.MEM_ZIP2W*/ SELECT a.MEM_SN,a.MEM_IDNO,a.MEM_PWD,a.MEM_NAME ,a.MEM_FOREIGN,a.MEM_EDU,a.MEM_BIRTH,a.MEM_SEX,a.MEM_MILITARY,a.MEM_MARRY ,a.MEM_GRADUATE,a.MEM_SCHOOL,a.MEM_DEPART ,a.MEM_ZIP,a.MEM_ADDR,a.MEM_TEL,a.MEM_TELN,a.MEM_MOBILE ,a.MEM_EMAIL,a.MEM_OPENSEC,a.MEM_MEMO,a.MEM_TIMS ,a.EPAPER,a.ELOGIN,a.MEM_USR_ID,a.MEM_REGTIME,a.MEM_OPUSER ,a.MEM_UDATE,a.HANDTYPEID,a.HANDLEVELID ,a.STOPMEM,a.MEM_LOGINCNT ,a.HANDTYPEID2,a.HANDLEVELID2 ,a.MFLAG,a.MEM_ZIP6W FROM E_MEMBER a WHERE ISNULL(a.STOPMEM,'N') ='N' AND a.MEM_IDNO=#MEM_IDNO# AND a.MEM_BIRTH=#MEM_BIRTH#
/* 調執行效能 7位 WHERE LEN(ESERNUM)_x8 */ SELECT ISNULL(MAX(ESERNUM),0)+1 NEWESERNUM FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE ESERNUM<=9999999
UPDATE SYS_AUTONUM SET CURVAL=CURVAL+1,MTIME=GETDATE() OUTPUT inserted.CURVAL WHERE TABLENAME='STUD_ENTERTYPE2_ESERNUM_SEQ2'
SELECT ISNULL(MAX(SERNUM),0)+1 NEWSERNUM FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 WHERE ESETID=#ESETID# AND ENTERDATE=#ENTERDATE#

SELECT a.ESERNUM /*PK*/ ,a.ESETID,a.SETID,a.ENTERDATE,a.SERNUM ,a.RELENTERDATE ,a.EXAMNO,a.OCID1,a.TMID1,a.OCID2,a.TMID2,a.OCID3,a.TMID3 ,a.IDENTITYID,a.RID,a.PLANID,a.CCLID ,a.SIGNUPSTATUS,a.SIGNUPMEMO,a.ISOUT ,a.SUPPLYID,a.BUDID ,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE ,a.ENTERPATH,a.WORKSUPPIDENT,a.USERNOSHOW ,a.NOTES,a.ISEMAILFAIL ,a.SIGNNO,a.INVOLLEAVER ,a.CFIRE1,a.CFIRE1NS,a.CFIRE1REASON,a.CFIRE1MACCT,a.CFIRE1MDATE ,a.CMASTER1,a.CMASTER1NS,a.CMASTER1REASON,a.CMASTER1MACCT,a.CMASTER1MDATE,a.CMASTER1NT ,a.CFIRE1R2,a.PREEXDATE,a.APID1,a.MIDENTITYID FROM STUD_ENTERTYPE2 a /*AND a.ENTERPATH !='E' */ WHERE isnull(a.ENTERPATH,'XX') !='E' AND a.ESETID=#ESETID# AND a.OCID1=#OCID1# /*AND a.ENTERDATE=#ENTERDATE#*/ AND a.SIGNUPSTATUS !=2
SELECT B.SETID,B.SERNUM ,B.OCID1 ,B.ENTERDATE FROM STUD_ENTERTEMP A JOIN STUD_ENTERTYPE B ON A.SETID=B.SETID WHERE A.IDNO=#IDN# AND B.OCID1=#OCID1#
/*'['+CJOB_TYPE+']'+*/ SELECT CJOB_TYPE ,CJOB_NAME CJOB_NAME FROM SHARE_CJOB WHERE CJOB_NO IS NULL AND CYEARS='2016' ORDER BY CONVERT(numeric, CJOB_TYPE)

/*'[' + CJOB_NO + ']' + AND CJOB_TYPE=#CJOB_TYPE#*/ SELECT CJOB_NO CJOB_UNKEY ,CJOB_TYPE ,CJOB_NAME JOBNAME FROM SHARE_CJOB WHERE CJOB_NO IS NOT NULL AND JOB_NO IS NULL AND CYEARS='2016' ORDER BY CJOB_NO

/*CJOB_NO + '.' + JOB_NO + AND CJOB_NO=#CJOB_NO# */ SELECT CJOB_UNKEY ,CJOB_TYPE ,CJOB_NO ,CJOB_NAME JOBNAME FROM SHARE_CJOB WHERE CJOB_NO IS NOT NULL AND JOB_NO IS NOT NULL AND CYEARS='2016' ORDER BY CJOB_NO ,JOB_NO
/*'(' + TRAINID + ')' +*/ SELECT CONVERT(VARCHAR,TMID) AS TMID ,TRAINNAME ,JOBTMID FROM VIEW_TRAINTYPE WHERE BUSID='H' AND TRAINID IS NOT NULL ORDER BY CONVERT(int,JOBID),CONVERT(int, TRAINID)
SELECT MAX($TABLEPK$) MAXPK FROM $TABLENAME$ WHERE 1=1

SELECT CC.OCID ,cc.CLASSCNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,cc.CTID ,cc.CTNAME ,dbo.FN_GZIP3(CC.TADDRESSZIP)+CC.TADDRESS TADDRESS ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,CC.DEFGOVCOST1 ,CC.DEFSTDCOST1 ,CASE WHEN CC.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME ,CASE cc.TPLANID WHEN '28' THEN '1' WHEN '06' THEN '2' WHEN '70' THEN '5' ELSE '' END PLANTYPE ,cc.REAL_TWD97_X ,cc.REAL_TWD97_Y FROM dbo.VIEW2 CC join dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE tt on tt.TMID=cc.TMID JOIN VIEW_RIDNAME rr on rr.RID =cc.RID WHERE CC.TNUM>0 AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.STDATE + 15 > GETDATE() /* AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() */
AND CC.TPLANID='28' AND CC.ISBUSINESS='N'
AND CC.TPLANID='06'
AND CC.TPLANID='70'
AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE()
AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE()
AND tt.JOBTMID=#JOBTMID#
AND CC.TMID in ($TMID$)
AND tt.BUSTMID=#PARENT1#
AND tt.JOBTMID=#PARENT2#
AND upper(cc.CLASSCNAME2) LIKE N'%'+upper(#KEYWORDS#)+'%'
AND CC.STDATE>=CONVERT(DATETIME, #STDATE#)
AND CC.STDATE < CONVERT(DATETIME, #FTDATE#)
AND (cc.DISTID in ($DISTID$))
AND (cc.CTID in ($CTID_KEY$))
AND (cc.CLASSCATE in ($CLASSCATE$))
AND (rr.ORGKIND2 in ($ORGKIND$))
ORDER BY CC.STDATE, CC.FENTERDATE DESC, CC.OCID

SELECT a.ORGID TB_ORGID ,a.RSID TB_RSID ,a.RID TB_RID ,a.ORGNAME TB_ORGNAME ,a.COMIDNO ,a.ORGKIND ,a.DISTID ,a.PLANID ,a.ORGLEVEL ,a.TWD97_X REAL_TWD97_X ,a.TWD97_Y REAL_TWD97_Y ,a.CTID ,a.CTNAME ,a.ZNAME ,a.ZIPNAME ,a.ZIPCODE ,a.ZIPCODE6W ,a.ADDRESS ,a.PHONE ,a.CONTACTEMAIL ,a.CONTACTCELLPHONE ,a.MODIFYDATE ,CASE WHEN a.PLANID=0 THEN '1' ELSE '2' END TB_TYPE FROM dbo.V_ORGINFO a WHERE (a.TWD97_X IS NOT NULL AND a.TWD97_Y IS NOT NULL )
AND a.CTID=#CTID#
AND a.ZIPCODE=#ZIPCODE#
ORDER BY a.MODIFYDATE,a.CTID

SELECT cs.OCID,cs.SOCID,cs.CLSID,cs.IDNO ,format(cs.BIRTHDAY,'yyyy/MM/dd') BIRTHDAY ,cs.NAME STDNAME ,format(cs.MODIFYDATE,'ssmmdd') TMD ,cs.STUDID2 ,cs.YEARS PLANYEAR ,cs.ORGNAME,cs.DISTNAME ,cs.STUDSTATUS,cs.STUDSTATUS2 ,cs.CLASSCNAME2 ,cs.CLASSCNAME,cs.CYCLTYPE ,cs.STDATE,cs.FTDATE ,GETDATE() ATODAY FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.TPLANID='06' AND cs.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3) AND cs.YEARS>=CONVERT(VARCHAR(5),YEAR(GETDATE())-3) AND cs.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cs.BIRTHDAY=#BIRTHDAY# ORDER BY cs.STDATE DESC

SELECT cs.IDNO ,cs.SID ,#RTE# RTE ,format(cs.MODIFYDATE,'ssmmdd') TMD ,cs.SOCID ,cs.OCID ,cs.CLSID ,cs.STUDSTATUS FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.TPLANID='06' AND cs.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3) AND format(cs.MODIFYDATE,'ssmmdd')=#TMD# AND cs.SOCID=#SOCID# AND cs.OCID=#OCID# AND cs.CLSID=#CLSID# AND cs.STUDSTATUS=#STUDSTATUS#
SELECT NEXT VALUE FOR TB_VIEWRECORD_SEQNO_SEQ TB_VIEWRECORD_SEQNO

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT CC.OCID ,CONCAT(CC.CLASSCNAME,CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME ,CONCAT(dbo.FN_GET_CLASSCNAME(CC.CLASSCNAME,CC.CYCLTYPE),CHAR(10),'(',OO.ORGNAME,')') CLASSCNAME2 ,CC.TNUM ,CC.THOURS ,(select ic.CTNAME from dbo.ID_CITY ic join dbo.ID_ZIP iz on iz.CTID=ic.CTID join dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE SP1 on SP1.ZIPCODE=iz.ZIPCODE where PP.ADDRESSSCIPTID=SP1.PTID) CTNAME1 ,(select ic.CTNAME from dbo.ID_CITY ic join dbo.ID_ZIP iz on iz.CTID=ic.CTID join dbo.PLAN_TRAINPLACE TP1 on TP1.ZIPCODE=iz.ZIPCODE where PP.ADDRESSTECHPTID=TP1.PTID) CTNAME2 ,CC.ISCLOSED ,CC.STDATE ,CC.FTDATE ,CC.SENTERDATE ,CC.FENTERDATE ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFGOVCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFGOVCOST ,dbo.FN_GET_COSTTNUM(PP.DEFSTDCOST,CC.TNUM) DEFSTDCOST ,CASE WHEN PP.ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE=1 THEN '報名時應先繳全額訓練費用' ELSE '報名時應先繳50%訓練費用' END ENTERSUPPLYSTYLE ,CC.ADMISSIONS ,OO.ORGNAME ,CC.CLASSCNAME OLDCLASSCNAME /*,PD.KID20,PD.D20KNAME1,PD.D20KNAME2,PD.D20KNAME3,PD.D20KNAME4,PD.D20KNAME5,PD.D20KNAME6*/ FROM dbo.CLASS_CLASSINFO CC JOIN dbo.ORG_ORGINFO OO ON OO.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO JOIN dbo.ID_PLAN IP ON IP.PLANID=CC.PLANID JOIN dbo.PLAN_PLANINFO PP ON PP.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PP.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PP.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.AUTH_RELSHIP AR ON AR.RID=CC.RID JOIN dbo.VIEW_TRAINTYPE TT ON TT.TMID =CC.TMID JOIN dbo.PLAN_VERREPORT PV ON PV.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PV.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PV.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO JOIN dbo.V_PLAN_DEPOT PD ON PD.PLANID=CC.PLANID AND PD.COMIDNO=CC.COMIDNO AND PD.SEQNO=CC.SEQNO WHERE CC.TNUM>0 /* AND IP.TPLANID='28' */ AND IP.TPLANID=#TPLANID# /*「政策性產業」(排除新農業、新南向)課程清單*/ AND ((PD.KID20 IS NOT NULL AND PD.KID20 NOT IN ('19','06')) OR (PD.KID25 IS NOT NULL AND PD.KID25_6 IS NULL)) AND PP.ISBUSINESS='N' AND CC.NOTOPEN ='N' AND CC.EVTA_NOSHOW IS NULL AND CC.ONSHELLDATE<=GETDATE() AND CC.FENTERDATE>=GETDATE() AND format(CC.STDATE,'yyyyMM')>=format(DATEADD(MONTH,-1, GETDATE()),'yyyyMM') AND format(CC.STDATE,'yyyyMM')<=format(DATEADD(MONTH,3, GETDATE()),'yyyyMM') ) TB ORDER BY STDATE, FENTERDATE DESC, OCID

SELECT cs.OCID,cs.SOCID,cs.TPLANID ,cs.DISTID,cs.DISTNAME,cs.YEARS ,dbo.FN_GET_ROC_YEAR(cs.YEARS) ROC_YEAR ,cs.PLANNAME,cs.ORGNAME,cs.CLASSCNAME2 CLASSCNAME ,cs.THOURS,cs.STDATE,cs.FTDATE ,cs.STUDSTATUS,cs.STUDSTATUS2 STUDSTATUS_N ,cs.CREDITPOINTS,dc.ISCHECK FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs LEFT JOIN dbo.STUD_DIGICERTCLASS dc WITH(NOLOCK) ON dc.DCANO=#DCANO# AND dc.OCID=cs.OCID WHERE cs.STUDSTATUS=5 AND cs.CREDITPOINTS=1 AND cs.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cs.IDNO=(SELECT IDNO FROM STUD_DIGICERTAPPLY WHERE DCANO=#DCANO# AND DCASENO=#DCASENO#) ORDER BY cs.YEARS,cs.STDATE
SELECT a.EMAIL_SN,a.MEM_SN,a.DCASENO,a.EMAIL ,a.EMVCODE,a.CHECKS,a.SNSTEXT ,a.E_OPUSER,a.E_CDATE,a.E_UDATE FROM E_EMAILCODE a WHERE a.E_CDATE>(GETDATE()-(1./24./12.)) AND a.MEM_SN=#MEM_SN#

SELECT a.DCANO,a.DCASENO,a.IDNO,a.CNAME,a.PURID,a.UAGID ,a.EMAIL,a.EMVCODE,a.GUID1,a.APPLNACCT,a.APPLNDATE ,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE,a.SENDACCT,a.SENDDATE FROM STUD_DIGICERTAPPLY a WHERE a.SENDDATE IS NOT NULL AND a.APPLNDATE>(GETDATE()-0.78) AND a.IDNO=#IDNO#

SELECT a.DCANO,a.DCASENO,a.IDNO,a.CNAME,a.PURID,a.UAGID,a.EMAIL,a.EMVCODE,a.GUID1 ,a.APPLNACCT,a.APPLNDATE,a.MODIFYACCT,a.MODIFYDATE,a.SENDACCT,a.SENDDATE FROM STUD_DIGICERTAPPLY a WHERE a.SENDDATE IS NOT NULL AND a.IDNO=#IDNO#
SELECT 'C' RPT,a.DCANO,a.DCASENO,a.EMVCODE FROM STUD_DIGICERTAPPLY a WHERE a.SENDDATE IS NOT NULL AND a.DCANO=#DCANO# AND a.DCASENO=#DCASENO# AND a.EMVCODE=#EMVCODE#
SELECT 'D' RPT,a.DCANO,a.DCASENO,a.EMVCODE FROM STUD_DIGICERTAPPLY a WHERE a.SENDDATE IS NOT NULL AND a.DCANO=#DCANO# AND a.DCASENO=#DCASENO# AND a.EMVCODE=#EMVCODE#

SELECT cs.OCID,cs.SOCID,cs.SID,cs.NAME CNAME ,cs.THOURS,cs.TNUM,cs.STDATE,cs.FTDATE ,cs.ORGNAME,cs.PLANNAME,cs.CLASSCNAME2 ,cs.IDNO,cs.BIRTHDAY ,cs.DISTID,cs.DISTNAME ,cs.YEARS,dbo.FN_CYEAR2(cs.YEARS) YEARS_ROC ,cs.STUDSTATUS,cs.STUDSTATUS2 STUDSTATUS_N, GETDATE() ATODAY FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.TPLANID='28' AND cs.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3) AND cs.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cs.BIRTHDAY=CONVERT(datetime,#BIRTHDAY_STR#) /*AND cs.YEARS>=YEAR(GETDATE())-3 AND cs.STDATE>=DATEADD(YEAR,-2,GETDATE()) AND cs.FTDATE>=DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE())*/

SELECT TOP 33 k.ELNO,k.ELID,k.ENAME,k.EDESC,k.ESORT /*,CASE WHEN e.SENDDATE IS NULL THEN '尚未繳交' ELSE '已繳交' END SEND_N*/ ,CASE WHEN e.SIGNDATE IS NULL THEN '尚未繳交' ELSE '已繳交' END SEND_N ,cs.NAME CNAME,cs.OCID,cs.SOCID,cs.SID, GETDATE() ATODAY ,cs.DISTID,cs.DISTNAME,cs.COMIDNO,cs.ORGNAME ,cs.CLASSCNAME2,cs.STDATE,cs.FTDATE,cs.STUDSTATUS,cs.STUDSTATUS2 STUDSTATUS_N ,e.CSELNO,e.P1_LINK,e.FILEPATH1,e.SIGNDACCT,e.SIGNDATE,e.SENDACCT,e.SENDDATE FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs CROSS JOIN KEY_ELFORM k LEFT JOIN STUD_ELFORM e on e.SOCID=cs.SOCID AND e.OCID=cs.OCID AND e.IDNO=cs.IDNO AND e.ELNO=k.ELNO WHERE cs.STUDSTATUS NOT IN (2,3) AND cs.TPLANID='28' /* AND cs.YEARS>=YEAR(GETDATE())-3 AND cs.STDATE>=DATEADD(YEAR,-2,GETDATE()) AND cs.FTDATE>=DATEADD(YEAR,-1,GETDATE()) */ AND cs.IDNO=#IDNO# AND cs.BIRTHDAY=CONVERT(datetime,#BIRTHDAY_STR#) AND cs.SOCID=#SOCID# AND cs.OCID=#OCID# AND cs.SID=#SID# ORDER BY k.ESORT
SELECT cs.TPLANID,cs.ORGKINDGW,cs.OCID,cs.RID,cs.SOCID,cs.SID,cs.YEARS ,dbo.FN_CYEAR2(cs.YEARS) YEARS_ROC FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.OCID=#OCID# AND cs.SOCID=#SOCID# AND cs.SID=#SID#
SELECT cs.TPLANID,cs.ORGKINDGW,cs.OCID,cs.RID,cs.SOCID,cs.SID,cs.YEARS ,dbo.FN_CYEAR2(cs.YEARS) YEARS_ROC FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.OCID=#OCID# AND cs.SOCID=#SOCID# AND cs.SID=#SID#
SELECT cs.TPLANID,cs.ORGKINDGW,cs.OCID,cs.RID,cs.SOCID,cs.SID,cs.YEARS ,dbo.FN_CYEAR2(cs.YEARS) YEARS_ROC FROM dbo.V_STUDENTINFO cs WHERE cs.OCID=#OCID# AND cs.SOCID=#SOCID# AND cs.SID=#SID#
SELECT BnakCode,BankName,[Text] FROM V_BANKLIST ORDER BY BnakCode
SELECT BranchCode,BranchName,[Text],BankName,APK1 FROM V_BRANCHLIST WHERE APK1=#APK1# ORDER BY BranchCode
